name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina=20=28iPhone=29?=
subject: Hey - I just voted!
body:
Sorry to bug you again Peter, but I wanted to let you know...

I just voted in person at a Voting Center!

It was quick. It was easy. Most importantly, it was my chance to vote to put America First and disrupt the status quo.

I posted a quick video message after I voted. You can check it out here. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/88dd93a8-a675-4d87-88dc-241bfb305d65?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=EarlyVote_3224)

Remember, you do NOT need to wait until Election Day to vote in person! Voting centers across the 47th District are OPEN TODAY for you to walk in and cast your ballot.

Click here to find the closest voting center in your city. (https://www.ocvote.gov/elections/vote-center-locations)

We have just three days until we win this primary and let Washington know that business-as-usual is OVER! Orange County is voting to put America First!

Please vote ... and tell your friends to vote ... and let's finish strong!

Max Ukropina

Sent from my iPhone
DONATE (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/max-ukropina-america-first?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=EarlyVote_3224)

============================================================
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&e=86e91e802d&c=b80d933a3b)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&t=b&e=86e91e802d&c=b80d933a3b)
.

**Here are three reasons why you should become an Official 2024 DLCC Member →** 1\. **Grassroots support has carried Democrats to victory,** helping us win over 30 special elections last year, defend our majorities in Pennsylvania and Virginia, and close in on Republicans’ majority in the New Hampshire House. _**We are in the middle of a total invasion, and our "President" is SIDING WITH THE INVADERS!**_

Friend, 2024 is in full swing. If we want ANY chance of saving our Senate majority this fall, it's time to unhitch the trailer and kick things into high gear.
**And it’s not just about our Senate majority — Rick Scott is one of the biggest threats to our country. Period. **
This guy wrote the plan so extreme even Republicans couldn’t win on it! **He wants****to end Social Security and Medicare and raise****taxes on everyone EXCEPT millionaires. Meanwhile, he’s one of the richest members of Congress. **
**[That's why I'm personally asking you to split $5 today between Kirsten and Debbie to help Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (D) hit her weekly $100,000 goal and flip Florida blue this November. This race is our best and possibly our ONLY chance of saving the Senate majority and beating one of the worst politicians in America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80182422/458620701/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4878-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU1ZTcwZi1mM2Q4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7ZcIalNhr6PZIpSn2JGHn4K_CD4GRb1hl07uZtTH1E=)**

I've spent half a century fighting to elect Democrats. So trust me when I say this: **All signs are pointing to a huge upset in Florida.****** Scott only won his seat by 0.12%, and his approval ratings are tanking. It's no wonder why election experts rank him as one of the most vulnerable senators in the country — people hate his policies.
Debbie is a strong candidate, but in a race like this, cash is king — and Scott has already dumped over $3 million into attack ads. **[This is a make-or-break moment, friend. Can I count on you to split a donation between Debbie and Kirsten right now so that Debbie can flip Florida blue and save our Senate majority? In a race like this, every $5 donation makes a world of difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80182424/458620703/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4878-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU1ZTcwZi1mM2Q4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7ZcIalNhr6PZIpSn2JGHn4K_CD4GRb1hl07uZtTH1E=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80182430/458620709/1575385346?refcode=jtk4878-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU1ZTcwZi1mM2Q4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7ZcIalNhr6PZIpSn2JGHn4K_CD4GRb1hl07uZtTH1E=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80182431/458620710/1575385346?refcode=jtk4878-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU1ZTcwZi1mM2Q4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7ZcIalNhr6PZIpSn2JGHn4K_CD4GRb1hl07uZtTH1E=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Katie Porter
subject: Dark money group strategy is paying off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
It’s no wonder the issues of women and families have been on the backburner for decades.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=38601%2E3422442%2ElhbynE)
Derek, I’ll be frank: Special interests have tried to buy this race, and their plan is working.
Yesterday the LA Times wrote, _“Rep. Adam B. Schiff’s**campaign strategy of spending millions to highlight Republican Senate candidate Steve Garvey’s conservative record appears to have paid off** , making Garvey a strong favorite to emerge from Tuesday’s primary as Schiff’s general election opponent.”_
And it’s not just Schiff who has outspent us, as the LA Times also reported: _“Porter has also been subjected to roughly**$10 million in attack ads from an outside group funded by Silicon Valley billionaires and cryptocurrency investors.** That appears to have hurt her standing among voters.”_
**Steve Garvey has not run a single TV ad on his own, but it’s looking like he might actually come in first in our primary,** here in blue California, all thanks to this play by Schiff and these dark money super PACs. Right now, initial turnout numbers show that older, whiter, more conservative voters are turning in the ballots, but other voters are not.
We have just three days until the election, and we’re doing everything we can to pull ahead: meet-and-greets, digital ads, and TV appearances. **[Anything you can give today will help us in this final most crucial stretch.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-3?refcode=em20240302-38601&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38601_3422442_lhbynE&akid=38601%2E3422442%2ElhbynE)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-3?refcode=em20240302-38601&refcode2=38601_3422442_lhbynE&akid=38601%2E3422442%2ElhbynE)
P.S. California voters–PLEASE get your ballots in by March 5th and encourage others to do the same. Find more information about voting at: [https://katieporter.com/vote/](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19968?t=2&akid=38601%2E3422442%2ElhbynE)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240302-38601&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=38601_3422442_lhbynE&akid=38601%2E3422442%2ElhbynE)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=4&akid=38601%2E3422442%2ElhbynE)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=38601%2E3422442%2ElhbynE)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: 15X MATCH
subject: NO NO NO NO NO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | |
**HELP!

Hello,
It didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in Colorado's 3rd congressional district, the smear campaign against me began.**
It’s no mystery why: In 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless the Super PACs lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win this critical seat in 2024.
I’m not running to represent myself. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.
I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by the Super PAC lies.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $20,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight so that we have the resources we need to win this critical seat, but right now we’re still $6,856 short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**
[**Please, if you’re able to, will you give $5 or more right now – any amount you can afford – to help us hit our goal and win this critical seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80182577/458638580/1610638071?refcode=em20240302pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=b456b656-f9d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDU2YjY1Ni1mOWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4OAuLY43wZhhR3isZna5rF6sdWnP7iJgSCjZA681BE=)

clean_body: The same day I announced that I was running again in Colorado's 3rd congressional district, the smear campaign against me began. Hello, It didn’t take long. The same day I announced that I was running again in Colorado's 3rd congressional district, the smear campaign against me began. It’s no mystery why: In 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless the Super PACs lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win this critical seat in 2024. I’m not running to represent myself. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by the Super PAC lies. We’ve set a goal of raising another $20,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight so that we have the resources we need to win this critical seat, but right now we’re still $6,856 short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now: = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I have something even more powerful than any special interests: You. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots campaign. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=87bf8bef9b9a4a759c0cd7f2692a0f39&_e=ULwrm4fDShzlHOajrpI3ahcIa0XB351FfxLe5PhvVrpH3zMX01mwKjyPlkb2fxceN7GWou1oWVc8Jps0lDYxhzB0Xpo9tRFovCDVXjaprjw4x_yTVonxqF2PialZkjTkOLg4_OGbAzTjMYmiofpVcv_3eMABTHXqMvVGdgJquMHglU20gszW_Ddz6MRTXICGbcaFc9oK9ZmtSBAOZS3WKtIbEj-J7Cgw2760W54dCZ_M6Lnryi52rvYWo0lrcYbypOVgyWqH-jmxOPiadQI0BRfqNCaUBx0Bz2SS2OC6f3Pk_QbUK9Xrm5YrxduTkOsjnTK714XwdHYXsFrJ1xd45ICbpqlEjdql9NbLtx3nlw6p6ZOYDaNoYisjeQgs_UxrCbgAnN-Xr80UxCwEbULS1g%3D%3D)

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Katie Porter
subject: personally reaching out to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I wanted to cut through the noise and write to you today
Derek, with just three days until the primary election, I want to cut through the noise and explain where things stand in this race.
Last week two new polls dropped. The first, showed us in third place, behind Republican Steve Garvey by six points. **The second, conducted later when voters had more time to see our ads, showed us one point ahead of Garvey and in second place.** These polls also show that large margins of voters—nearly 20% are still undecided about who to support.
So while this forward movement is a promising sign, Schiff saw the exact same poll. He has been spending millions of dollars to try and *boost* Garvey into the second place spot so that he has an easy-to-defeat general election opponent.
**Both Schiff and his super PAC are spending heavily on Fox News to propel Garvey into second place, despite Schiff’s previous calls for advertisers to boycott the network.**
To be frank, Schiff and the super PACs supporting him are just drowning us out. He’s spent $25 million on advertising and **has twice as much cash on hand as us** , and is outspending us three to one on TV.
On top of that, a crypto industry backed super PAC has spent **$10M on deceptive ads** attacking me.
**I wouldn’t ask for your $5 if this race was hopeless.** Even though we’ve been outspent throughout this race, we’re still in a dead heat for second place. As voters tune in during this final stretch, we must reach the millions who are still undecided.
If I come in third, my time in Congress—fighting corruption, holding polluters accountable, and as the only single mom of school aged kids—comes to an end. If we make it past the primary, polling shows I have a strong chance of winning the general. I just need your help, right now, to stand up to the corporate special interests attempting to buy this seat. **With just three days left, can you make a $5 donation right now?**
Here’s a link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-4](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-4?refcode=em20240302-38596&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38596_3422442_84lAHL&akid=38596%2E3422442%2E84lAHL)**
Thank you in advance, I can’t do this without you.
Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=1&akid=38596%2E3422442%2E84lAHL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=38596%2E3422442%2E84lAHL)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

Woof!
| | |
---
Woof!

Hi there, friend, it's Spike from Team Debbie!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80183460/458650420/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk884-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkzYTVjNTMtMDBkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vm1n0W17xDeq12Wx8pquoMCw40LAPKzEjRVlXRw-Qe0=)
My mom is running for Senate, and that makes me just about the luckiest pup ever. I've met a gazillion new people, and ALL of them love me. I've gotten so many extra pets from mom's team. And I'm even becoming an influencer on my mom's social media! (Still waiting for Chewy to make me a brand ambassador...)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80183461/458650421/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk884-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkzYTVjNTMtMDBkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vm1n0W17xDeq12Wx8pquoMCw40LAPKzEjRVlXRw-Qe0=)
Yep, being the candidate's pup is a pretty sweet gig. But there's a lot of other good stuff about my mom running for Senate.
My mom is the kindest, most hard-working human I know — not to mention, she gives the best pets (don't tell Dad). She'll always make time to take me on a walk or play fetch, even after she's spent the whole day meeting voters and hearing about the issues that matter to them. And once she gets to Washington, she's going to do everything in her power to fight for the stuff that really matters to families (and pups like me).
**But to get all the way to the Senate, she's going to need help from people like you! [Will you chip in $5 today to help my mom flip Florida blue and bring better leadership (and more treats for all of us!) to Florida?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80183462/458650422/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk884-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkzYTVjNTMtMDBkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vm1n0W17xDeq12Wx8pquoMCw40LAPKzEjRVlXRw-Qe0=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80183463/458650423/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk884-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkzYTVjNTMtMDBkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vm1n0W17xDeq12Wx8pquoMCw40LAPKzEjRVlXRw-Qe0=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80183464/458650424/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk884-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkzYTVjNTMtMDBkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vm1n0W17xDeq12Wx8pquoMCw40LAPKzEjRVlXRw-Qe0=)
---
I know my mom will be the best senator ever — for dogs and their humans! That guy named Rick is really barking up the wrong tree with his paw-licies, but my mom is ready to tackle every issue to undo his mess. She'll protect wild places like the Everglades to make sure that we can enjoy the natural beauty of Florida for generations to come. And she'll fight climate change to save coastal communities and defend our planet. I like to consider myself an outdoorsman of sorts, so that's what matters most to me.
But whether it's lowering health care costs, creating more affordable housing, or restoring reproductive rights, she's always going to fight for what's right, even when it gets ruff. (Ok, there's one exception: I still haven't convinced her to ban mail carriers. She _claims_ that the USPS is a "vital public institution." I know, I know ... not a good look. But don't worry, I'm making a very strong, _very_ vocal argument against them six days a week.)
**Differences aside, I'm all in to send my mom to the Senate.[If you are too, will you chip in $5 or more before midnight to help her hit her $50,000 fundraising goal? I'm not very good at math, but it sounds like a big number ... and I keep hearing her say this is a really important one so it'd be super great if you could chip in today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80183465/458650425/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk884-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkzYTVjNTMtMDBkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vm1n0W17xDeq12Wx8pquoMCw40LAPKzEjRVlXRw-Qe0=)**

clean_body: Woof! | | | Woof! Hi there, friend, it's Spike from Team Debbie! = My mom is running for Senate, and that makes me just about the luckiest pup ever. I've met a gazillion new people, and ALL of them love me. I've gotten so many extra pets from mom's team. And I'm even becoming an influencer on my mom's social media! (Still waiting for Chewy to make me a brand ambassador...) = Yep, being the candidate's pup is a pretty sweet gig. But there's a lot of other good stuff about my mom running for Senate. My mom is the kindest, most hard-working human I know — not to mention, she gives the best pets (don't tell Dad). She'll always make time to take me on a walk or play fetch, even after she's spent the whole day meeting voters and hearing about the issues that matter to them. And once she gets to Washington, she's going to do everything in her power to fight for the stuff that really matters to families (and pups like me). But to get all the way to the Senate, she's going to need help from people like you! = = | | = I know my mom will be the best senator ever — for dogs and their humans! That guy named Rick is really barking up the wrong tree with his paw-licies, but my mom is ready to tackle every issue to undo his mess. She'll protect wild places like the Everglades to make sure that we can enjoy the natural beauty of Florida for generations to come. And she'll fight climate change to save coastal communities and defend our planet. I like to consider myself an outdoorsman of sorts, so that's what matters most to me. But whether it's lowering health care costs, creating more affordable housing, or restoring reproductive rights, she's always going to fight for what's right, even when it gets ruff. (Ok, there's one exception: I still haven't convinced her to ban mail carriers. She claims that the USPS is a "vital public institution." I know, I know ... not a good look. But don't worry, I'm making a very strong, very vocal argument against them six days a week.) Differences aside, I'm all in to send my mom to the Senate.= | | = Thanks for reading! – Spike 🐾 | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Jim Daly, Focus on the Family
subject: Saving mothers and babies from abortion
body:
Research shows that more than 54% of women considering an abortion will choose life after receiving counseling and an ultrasound.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695012%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aPIl4%2bCbRFmqC0FIeuIn4A&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, **Research shows that more than 54% of women considering an abortion will choose life after receiving counseling and an ultrasound. ** Thanks to the support of pro-life Americans just like you, Focus on the Family’s _Option Ultrasound_ _Program_ has saved more than half a million babies in the past two decades. [**You can save a mother and her baby from abortion with your gift of $60 today. Please help us make ultrasounds possible for abortion-vulnerable women.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695013%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gywFwTnJ8BBo47W44GpvuQ&sysid=1)
---
[DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695014%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J4x9w%2bHpnjgLSozQQ%2frQ%2bg&sysid=1)
---
Abortion is taking the lives of babies and ruining the lives of mothers and fathers. But with free ultrasounds made possible through _Option Ultrasound_ , mothers have the opportunity to hear the beat of their baby’s heart. **When a mother sees her baby sucking its tiny thumb or wriggling on an ultrasound, she won’t be deceived by the abortionists’ claims that babies are “blobs of tissue” in the womb.** [**Your support will equip life-affirming pregnancy centers across the country with ultrasound machines, resources, and nurses’ sonography training so abortion-vulnerable mothers can meet their babies ... and be moved to choose life.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695025%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CkiVCTQMNJYxcdQYUwJHqQ&sysid=1) Studies show that women who have abortions are more likely to suffer from depression, anxiety, PTSD, and substance abuse, as compared to those who give birth. Carrie -- a young woman who chose abortion -- shared, “Legalized abortion has created a culture where you feel like abortion is the only choice. That’s not empowerment for women. That’s bondage.” After ending the life of her baby, Carrie says she was “foundering in relationships and medicating (her) emotional pain with alcohol.” She was tormented by the fact that she had paid someone to end her child’s life. [**While nothing will bring Carrie’s baby back, you can prevent another mother from making the same heartbreaking decision with your gift of $60 today. Every $60 we raise will save an additional life thanks to the power of an ultrasound.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695026%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DMMUBHamr8h5VfH3aPRHOQ&sysid=1) Thanks to generous donors, we also run My Choice Network -- an online resource that connects expectant moms with pregnancy medical centers. Since the network launched in 2020, more than 250,000 appointments have been made at life-saving centers. You can also help us increase our presence in high-risk areas and train physicians and nurses in abortion pill reversal -- trainings that have saved more than 3,000 lives in less than four years. **[**Please help with your immediate gift of $60 or more today and save the life of a baby today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695027%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qqahWcMHhVdHzpCzuoX8DA&sysid=1)**
---
[DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695014%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J4x9w%2bHpnjgLSozQQ%2frQ%2bg&sysid=1)
---
Thank you for your support!
---
---
Jim Daly President, Focus on the Family P.S. **[Give now to join our campaign this month and save mothers and babies from the tragedy of abortion!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695028%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=STFujn2ll5m0QFn22Y%2fhlg&sysid=1)** Focus on the Family 8605 Explorer Dr. Colorado Springs, CO 80920 1-800-A-FAMILY (232-6459)
---
| |
---

American Update
---

name: Your America
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30115%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5MR73RbbOO87O0pNyrmaeA&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30116%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YuNQrKHXal1pBW6v90vvYg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world’s elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “We need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that’s not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we’ll send the Great Reset seminar lectures --absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30117%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tcmnTWs77fUi6YnUh0zSRQ&sysid=1)

Don’t miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: =?utf-8?B?SmFtZXMgT+KAmUtlZWZl?=
subject: I am everywhere
body:
We’re watching, listening, and recording in their government offices. We are their dinner dates, smiling and nodding as they give up their secrets.

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30114%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rfS7pKJNyqnBNSescn8uBA&sysid=1)

Dear Friend,
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30125%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=einPwyUZbxrWKMZ00KoEMA&sysid=1)
In Orwell’s book _1984_ , “Big Brother” had “telescreens” watching and listening on every street and living room of the fictional nation, Oceania.

Published in 1949, Orwell's nightmare totalitarian state only took a few decades to become true here in America.

We are watched and spied on while cameras follow us constantly. But it’s not just our governments doing the monitoring. Big Tech corporations have us trapped in a digital loop where privacy doesn’t exist.

But now, the tables have turned, not through technology or massive surveillance sweeps, but through OMG’s network of undercover citizen journalists.

**OMG is EVERYWHERE and EVERYONE.**

We are in their board rooms, on their school boards, and lurking in their Zoom meetings. We are the employees who have had enough. We are their students and in their classrooms.

We’re watching, listening, and recording in their government offices.

We are their dinner dates, smiling and nodding as they give up their secrets.

We’re their friendly spotter at the gym with a gift for gab.

While they are powered by algorithms and broad data captures, we are the humans getting to the truth with good old intellect and cunning.

We are the million-eyed monster that feeds on truth.

And you? What is your role in reversing the power dynamic in America?

You make it all possible through your support, and **[I ask that you back OMG today](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30126%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bg5J4MBjsKS%2fFbEHJ9clvA&sysid=1).**

Right now, YOU pay governments and corporations to monitor you and your family's every move.

Let that sink in. YOU pay THEM to spy on all of us.

Shouldn’t you have a right to know what goes on behind their closed doors?

OMG is making that possible, and I'm asking you to invest in us **to keep watching the watchers.**

I'm expanding our network of citizen journalists at a pace that trumps the growth of any newsroom in history. My small staff must keep up with the content coming our way and sort through hundreds of whistleblower tips daily.

**[Please help us grow to bring more truth to light.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30127%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XcBGm4w7i9J2ojQAcNaXPg&sysid=1)**

I have another $29,300 to raise by Friday to meet our growing costs and expenses. Travel, payroll, equipment, and endless hours of editing come at a significant cost.

**I’m relying on you to help keep us going and to help us grow.**

**[Please chip in today to help meet this goal.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30128%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OktHUoerdB6fZwyQdxsWmg&sysid=1)**

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

We are their dinner dates, smiling and nodding as they give up their secrets. | Dear Friend, In Orwell’s book 1984 , “Big Brother” had “telescreens” watching and listening on every street and living room of the fictional nation, Oceania. Published in 1949, Orwell's nightmare totalitarian state only took a few decades to become true here in America. We are watched and spied on while cameras follow us constantly. But it’s not just our governments doing the monitoring. Big Tech corporations have us trapped in a digital loop where privacy doesn’t exist. But now, the tables have turned, not through technology or massive surveillance sweeps, but through OMG’s network of undercover citizen journalists. OMG is EVERYWHERE and EVERYONE. We are in their board rooms, on their school boards, and lurking in their Zoom meetings. We are the employees who have had enough. We are their students and in their classrooms. We’re watching, listening, and recording in their government offices. We are their dinner dates, smiling and nodding as they give up their secrets. We’re their friendly spotter at the gym with a gift for gab. While they are powered by algorithms and broad data captures, we are the humans getting to the truth with good old intellect and cunning. We are the million-eyed monster that feeds on truth. And you? What is your role in reversing the power dynamic in America? You make it all possible through your support, and . Right now, YOU pay governments and corporations to monitor you and your family's every move. Let that sink in. YOU pay THEM to spy on all of us. Shouldn’t you have a right to know what goes on behind their closed doors? OMG is making that possible, and I'm asking you to invest in us to keep watching the watchers. I'm expanding our network of citizen journalists at a pace that trumps the growth of any newsroom in history. My small staff must keep up with the content coming our way and sort through hundreds of whistleblower tips daily. I have another $29,300 to raise by Friday to meet our growing costs and expenses. Travel, payroll, equipment, and endless hours of editing come at a significant cost. I’m relying on you to help keep us going and to help us grow. In Truth, James O’Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0ORiMM2yqj4nDbYOB18pXw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0ORiMM2yqj4nDbYOB18pXw~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0ORiMM2yqj4nDbYOB18pXw~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---

subject: Will you Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YhF2RlIzWUdHZPZk1fENrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt1OP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeLrRuRloeebd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YhF2RlIzWUdHZPZk1fENrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt1OP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeLrRuRloeebd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YhF2RlIzWUdHZPZk1fENrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt1OP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeLrRuRloeebd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YhF2RlIzWUdHZPZk1fENrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt1OP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeLrRuRloeebd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YhF2RlIzWUdHZPZk1fENrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt1OP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeLrRuRloeebd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YhF2RlIzWUdHZPZk1fENrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt1OP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeLrRuRloeebd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YhF2RlIzWUdHZPZk1fENrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt1OP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeLrRuRloeebd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/K5DgEmx_QVm15-ndxnb7LA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxuOiP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMzAxMjRfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjQwMzAzVwNzcGNCCmXiH0fkZbvmn-ZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/K5DgEmx_QVm15-ndxnb7LA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxuOiP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMzAxMjRfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjQwMzAzVwNzcGNCCmXiH0fkZbvmn-ZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/K5DgEmx_QVm15-ndxnb7LA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxuOiP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMzAxMjRfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjQwMzAzVwNzcGNCCmXiH0fkZbvmn-ZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWBggmPihN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWBggmPihN

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How important is religious liberty to you?
body:
I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=936795ab3f9545458aa8df5cd530e5c5&_e=EFyoc-LVdFQ7Zo30L61N4GwGsUY7rcnhBMhdaq2oEH5cpRdQzgiSVdhZMVO9Oa7yHzLkn8zKnJK095AqgUGbGklNkrscOnRWmV016VY7nXdpUxsHA_tfm0erhR35FdpDW1ZutBCtWE4v33pVJn6xW0eAKWqZVK65PHw7TEcjMYNIwjpbUoUZR95fNsR46tq12rAc39vqeHxl7pwL6k_Abdgn_x7wzBfUywFFSsKAevoPUAW0UlYirHuprkZ2_XkPnLkASp-z1SpojFvjnH9xC5ZdC9YDsg219kSB25Oj7LIG2FWqVw7FSf_onWNC7WMbvc4gg_iO3fsXgreacvVXMuBT1dEVH_pSx5_fhoPaTC2u09LLW-pZ4iA6DJIFNOZqNQE_gPkW1dEuWoc7RVgYtA%3D%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=936795ab3f9545458aa8df5cd530e5c5&_e=EFyoc-LVdFQ7Zo30L61N4GwGsUY7rcnhBMhdaq2oEH5cpRdQzgiSVdhZMVO9Oa7yHzLkn8zKnJK095AqgUGbGklNkrscOnRWmV016VY7nXdpUxsHA_tfm0erhR35FdpDW1ZutBCtWE4v33pVJn6xW0eAKWqZVK65PHw7TEcjMYNIwjpbUoUZR95fNsR46tq12rAc39vqeHxl7pwL6k_Abdgn_x7wzBfUywFFSsKAevoPUAW0UlYirHuprkZ2_XkP9VCNn93FqNnO9O_CALP6BaW3rYG3w29KS6Pfks4dXWED5YgJ0a3urRdYkRF84kenO7cg2D6rYeYW7oneWHq2Ohjf0n70ODM_QXJ27y6MvV-wU-Grf-Wp1mXvJr9DzqVQ0Ms1nN5yAmI-Jpy_Qfg7ag%3D%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=936795ab3f9545458aa8df5cd530e5c5&_e=EFyoc-LVdFQ7Zo30L61N4GwGsUY7rcnhBMhdaq2oEH5cpRdQzgiSVdhZMVO9Oa7yHzLkn8zKnJK095AqgUGbGklNkrscOnRWmV016VY7nXdpUxsHA_tfm0erhR35FdpDW1ZutBCtWE4v33pVJn6xW0eAKWqZVK65PHw7TEcjMYNIwjpbUoUZR95fNsR46tq12rAc39vqeHxl7pwL6k_Abdgn_x7wzBfUywFFSsKAevoPUAW0UlYirHuprkZ2_XkPnXPb0PQuqxTPOfmcVwUZtjToKVg0PIDSwcEaRpEvYfcBHX0wTjqVvwATpFLUg1HNsfgccJCHYdhWkIfe5KbdL9svONl-lZrw3vKjJ81_RNfphAjYMavgzuWSzXBu8oXd9LtvfWO6lsAIHI_XPov29w%3D%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
This is nothing new for us.

| | | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0L2K7CAYxvGr0W4Gv2JiYTEwpDgwp9hmS3nVdzIumoSoLHP3S2AvYNt_8Xvg-Xy4B6Sc1uU_FLRHcUd1gM57V8PWer1ASaFXJ5hQFyYvTDpOo9VGjBOnaPnIjNJiHDl92WdUAwMfDQ9yEsM0oJkUM9rHiQc_IE32dJhkkjOlObsiPA3yKXCPOj6VJooduHefU4C1wNd2pPa-rthotq_W9krkjYiZiNmDf-dt9YjXsBUi5j3DWomceyuuYEy9EHnHAikToc9Yt34EJPIO-FsClB3SshJ5_3jc_ilttKSHjft3yjlVPRLFllM4J2j74z0_AQAA___S22yp)

|
---
[](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0L2K7CAYxvGr0W4Gv2JiYTEwpDgwp9hmS3nVdzIumoSoLHP3S2AvYNt_8Xvg-Xy4B6Sc1uU_FLRHcUd1gM57V8PWer1ASaFXJ5hQFyYvTDpOo9VGjBOnaPnIjNJiHDl92WdUAwMfDQ9yEsM0oJkUM9rHiQc_IE32dJhkkjOlObsiPA3yKXCPOj6VJooduHefU4C1wNd2pPa-rthotq_W9krkjYiZiNmDf-dt9YjXsBUi5j3DWomceyuuYEy9EHnHAikToc9Yt34EJPIO-FsClB3SshJ5_3jc_ilttKSHjft3yjlVPRLFllM4J2j74z0_AQAA___S22yp)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0L2K7CAYxvGr0W4Gv2JiYTEwpDgwp9hmS3nVdzIumoSoLHP3S2AvYNt_8Xvg-Xy4B6Sc1uU_FLRHcUd1gM57V8PWer1ASaFXJ5hQFyYvTDpOo9VGjBOnaPnIjNJiHDl92WdUAwMfDQ9yEsM0oJkUM9rHiQc_IE32dJhkkjOlObsiPA3yKXCPOj6VJooduHefU4C1wNd2pPa-rthotq_W9krkjYiZiNmDf-dt9YjXsBUi5j3DWomceyuuYEy9EHnHAikToc9Yt34EJPIO-FsClB3SshJ5_3jc_ilttKSHjft3yjlVPRLFllM4J2j74z0_AQAA___S22yp)

This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0L2K7CAYxvGr0W4Gv2JiYTEwpDgwp9hmS3nVdzIumoSoLHP3S2AvYNt_8Xvg-Xy4B6Sc1uU_FLRHcUd1gM57V8PWer1ASaFXJ5hQFyYvTDpOo9VGjBOnaPnIjNJiHDl92WdUAwMfDQ9yEsM0oJkUM9rHiQc_IE32dJhkkjOlObsiPA3yKXCPOj6VJooduHefU4C1wNd2pPa-rthotq_W9krkjYiZiNmDf-dt9YjXsBUi5j3DWomceyuuYEy9EHnHAikToc9Yt34EJPIO-FsClB3SshJ5_3jc_ilttKSHjft3yjlVPRLFllM4J2j74z0_AQAA___S22yp)**

I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_St_wHoOCmXAI3mNP9qIOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt0wP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1BRlIyLTIwMjQwMzAzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PU1DQVotUG9wQSZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHVwNzcGNCCmXiHVXkZbqQ0LVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_St_wHoOCmXAI3mNP9qIOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt0wP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1BRlIyLTIwMjQwMzAzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PU1DQVotUG9wQSZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHVwNzcGNCCmXiHVXkZbqQ0LVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_St_wHoOCmXAI3mNP9qIOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxt0wP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1BRlIyLTIwMjQwMzAzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PU1DQVotUG9wQSZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHVwNzcGNCCmXiHVXkZbqQ0LVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/67TqltfvKJZe7kLAwoJH3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxvGUP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeONVeRlGucyd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/67TqltfvKJZe7kLAwoJH3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxvGUP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeONVeRlGucyd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/67TqltfvKJZe7kLAwoJH3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxvGUP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeONVeRlGucyd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/67TqltfvKJZe7kLAwoJH3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxvGUP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeONVeRlGucyd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/67TqltfvKJZe7kLAwoJH3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxvGUP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeONVeRlGucyd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate

|

My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Consider...
body:
I want to remind you of some things we’ve seen (and lived through) in recent years—which we never thought we’d see in our country...

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Sip44aP3lHHgdPRia28uUg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxvicP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeK1VeRlupKGQFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Sip44aP3lHHgdPRia28uUg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxvicP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeK1VeRlupKGQFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Sip44aP3lHHgdPRia28uUg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxvicP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDAzMDNXA3NwY0IKZeK1VeRlupKGQFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
