| Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU.
Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly.
I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you.
If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars?
It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support.After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.

Allows localities by ordinance to charge enhanced civil penalties for certain local property violations on property that is zoned or utilized for industrial or commercial purposes. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to civil penalties for certain local property violations; industrial and commercial areas.24102129D | | == House Bills on Third Reading - Regular Calendar ... == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == Bills in Conference .. == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == | | == | == Patron: Sullivan Electric utilities; regional transmission entities; annual report. Requires each incumbent electric utility that is a member of or has established a regional transmission entity for purposes of management and control of its transmission system as required under current law to submit an annual report by February 1 of each year. Such report shall include all recorded votes cast by the utility during the immediately preceding calendar year, all votes cast by an affiliate of the utility, and a brief description explaining how each vote cast by the utility or its affiliate is in the public interest. == Patron: Helmer Public utilities; delay of termination of service for certain residential customers; serious medical condition; report. Requires the State Corporation Commission to conduct a proceeding to establish limitations on the authority of public utilities and cooperatives that provide electric, gas, or water or wastewater services to terminate service to any residential customer who provides certification that the customer has a serious medical condition or the customer resides with a family member with a serious medical condition. The bill directs the Commission to adopt regulations to implement such limitations after consulting with certain stakeholders. The bill requires the Commission to submit a report by November 1, 2026, and every three years thereafter, on the effectiveness of the serious medical condition policy after implementation of the regulations and include any suggested changes to such policy for residential utility and cooperative customers. == Patron: Coyner Restroom Access Act. Requires a retail establishment that does not have a public restroom but has an employee toilet facility to allow any customer with an eligible medical condition, as defined in the bill, to use such employee toilet facility during normal business hours if certain conditions are met. A customer who suffers loss as a result of a violation may bring an action to recover damages not to exceed $100. == Patron: Webert Electric utilities; pilot program for underground transmission lines; additional project. Adds one project to the existing pilot program for underground transmission lines. The bill requires the State Corporation Commission to approve one additional application filed between January 1, 2024, and October 1, 2024, as a qualifying project to be constructed in whole or in part underground, as a part of the pilot program. The bill requires that the added qualifying project be a newly proposed 230-kilovolt underground line and that (i) an engineering analysis demonstrates that it is technically feasible to place the proposed line, in whole or in part, underground; (ii) the governing body of each locality in which a portion of the proposed line will be placed underground indicates, by resolution, general community support for the project and that the governing body supports the transmission line to be placed underground; (iii) a project has been filed with the Commission or is pending issuance of a certificate of public convenience and necessity by October 1, 2024; (iv) the estimated additional cost of placing the proposed line, in whole or in part, underground does not exceed $40 million or, if greater than $40 million, the cost does not exceed 2.5 times the cost of placing the same line overhead, assuming accepted industry standards for undergrounding to ensure safety and reliability; if the public utility, the affected localities, and the Commission agree, a proposed underground line whose cost exceeds 2.5 times the cost of placing the line overhead may also be accepted into the pilot program; (v) the public utility requests that the project be considered as a qualifying project under the pilot program; and (vi) the primary need of the project is for purposes of grid reliability or grid resiliency or to support economic development priorities of the Commonwealth, including the economic development priorities and the comprehensive plan of the governing body of the locality in which at least a portion of line will be placed, and not to address aging assets that would have otherwise been replaced in due course. == Patron: Sewell Veterans' Services Protection Act; prohibited practices; penalty. Creates the Veterans' Services Protection Act to prohibit any person from receiving compensation for preparing, presenting, prosecuting, advising, consulting, or assisting any individual regarding any veterans' benefits matter, as defined in the bill, except as permitted under federal law. The bill provides that a violation of its provisions constitutes a prohibited practice under the Virginia Consumer Protection Act. == Patron: Wilt Health insurance for local employees. Permits any locality to allow participation in its group health insurance program by any non-benefitted employee, including members of governing bodies, if such non-benefitted employee or governing body member is not otherwise entitled to participate, provided that such non-benefitted employees reimburse the locality for the full cost of their participation. The bill provides that reimbursement may include foregoing all or a part of a local government salary. == Patron: Tran Long-term care insurance; rate increases; notice requirements. Requires an insurer providing long-term care insurance policies to issue a written notice to each policyholder of the insurer's filing for a rate increase with the State Corporation Commission within 60 days of making such filing. Additionally, the bill requires the insurer to (i) if the Commission denies the rate increase, issue a written notice to each policyholder of the Commission's final decision to deny the rate increase within 90 days of such decision or (ii) if the Commission approves the rate increase, issue a written notice to each policyholder of the rate increase at least 90 days before its effective date that includes certain information listed in the bill. The bill requires the Commission, in reviewing requests to increase long-term care insurance rates, to consider, to the extent practicable, how the rate increase will impact policyholders. == Patron: Wyatt Virginia Employment Commission; provision of certain confidential information to the Virginia Port Authority. Requires the Virginia Employment Commission to provide certain employment information to the Virginia Port Authority as may be necessary to facilitate the administration and enforcement by the Authority of performance agreements with businesses that have received incentive awards. The bill provides that any information provided to the Authority is confidential, requires that the information only be disclosed to members of the Authority who are public officials or employees of the Authority for the performance of their official duties, and prohibits redisclosure of any such confidential information to nonlegislative citizen members of the Authority or to the public. == Patron: Higgins Department of Labor and Industry; asbestos and lead project permit; usage of licensing fees. Provides that fees collected by the Department of Labor and Industry paid by licensed asbestos and certified lead contractors for obtaining asbestos and lead project permits are to be used by the Department in carrying out its mission under the Virginia Asbestos NESHAP Act. == Patron: Milde Insurance; coverage for the diminished value of personal property. Requires any insurer who issues or delivers a new or renewal homeowner's insurance policy or a stand-alone policy that covers scheduled personal property in the Commonwealth to offer in writing a provision providing coverage for the diminution in the value of any such scheduled personal property, if the schedule provides for the repair of such property. Under the bill, the diminution in value of the personal property is the amount, if any, by which the market value of the personal property immediately following the completion of repair of the damage to the personal property is less than the market value of the personal property immediately prior to the damage and the change in market value is a direct result of damage from the covered loss. The provisions of the bill shall apply to every such policy that is issued, delivered, or renewed by an insurer licensed in the Commonwealth on or after July 1, 2025. == Patron: Hayes Uniform Commercial Code; amendments. Makes a number of amendments to the Uniform Commercial Code (UCC) as adopted in Virginia. The bill amends the definitions of "money" and "conspicuous" for purposes of the UCC and makes extensive amendments throughout provisions related to UCC Article 9 to accommodate emerging technologies. Such amendments include updating the traditional rules for attachment and perfection to apply to digital assets, such as controllable electronic records, and changes to several definitions, including "chattel paper," which is reconfigured to reflect the concept that chattel paper is a secured party's or lessor's right to payment that is secured by specific goods or owned by a lessee under an agreement that includes specific goods, if evidenced by a tangible or electronic record. Under current law, UCC Article 9 provides that perfection of money is through possession; however, since the definition of "money" is amended by this bill to include intangible assets, the amended provisions related to UCC Article 9 describe perfection by control, requiring the electronic money to either be in a deposit account or evidenced through a controllable electronic record. Further amendments to provisions related to UCC Article 9 include updates to governing law provisions for perfection and priority of security interests in chattel paper and in controllable electronic records, controllable accounts, and controllable payment intangibles. The bill includes amendments to provisions governing sales and leases to provide clarification regarding hybrid or bundled transactions and adds definitions for "hybrid transaction" and "hybrid lease." The bill provides the following approach to the application of provisions related to sales or leases in hybrid or bundled transactions: if the goods aspect of the hybrid transaction predominates, then the provisions that relate to sales or leases apply, but if other aspects predominate, then the provisions that relate primarily to the goods but not the transaction as a whole apply. The bill also adds a new title that parallels UCC Article 12, relating to controllable electronic records, as defined in the bill, and explaining the payment rights of a purchaser of an electronic record when such record is transferred. To fall within the scope of these provisions, the bill specifies that an electronic record must be controllable. The bill provides that to transfer the economic value associated with the controllable electronic record, or to receive the benefits associated with the controllable electronic record free of competing property interests, a person must have control of the controllable electronic record, which depends on requirements as described in the bill. The new title that parallels UCC Article 12 also describes qualifying purchasers of controllable electronic records, debtor security interests in relation to the person identified as in control of the controllable electronic record, and how to demonstrate control for purposes of priority and order of payment rights. These new provisions also include choice of law provisions to determine jurisdiction of a controllable electronic record. The bill includes a number of transition provisions to address perfection and priority issues that may arise after the effective date of the bill. Under the transition provisions of the bill, the Commonwealth may provide an adjustment date of one year after the effective date of the bill to allow persons with established perfection or priority to perfect their interests that may otherwise be affected or lost after the adjustment date based on the UCC amendments in the bill. Finally, the bill makes technical amendments throughout the UCC. This bill is a recommendation of the Virginia Commissioners to the National Conference of Commissioners on Uniform State Laws. == Patron: Reid Submetering or energy allocation equipment; billing requirements; unit owners. Provides that for the purposes of rules promulgated by the State Corporation Commission related to billing requirements and all other rules related to submetering or energy allocation equipment, those rules applicable to tenants will be applicable to residential and nonresidential unit owners. == Patron: Jones Local government employee insurance programs. subject: Phone Banking from Home (Zoom) - Vince
body:
Dear Laura Phone Banking Team,

I created a Zoom meeting for everyone that decided to phone bank from home.

Laura and I are on the zoom link to answer any questions.

You can just click the link - no password required.

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3fc52e7bb5384f7387726aa0bc86d382&_e=dJyUxEkrbpSbnwlIXD0szgNZmMxfmByBWRrc04fXWYrkrRXB0Ev8FV0JRTdOAbu_M5-gTQHHj13DnVbDqs0Rv_6rdi75Pf-6lylzE-tUieIZcNRhwyizuBUqOkwbSnTJ6ylXsTlSlc1P4uVJPosheJV2J7j5Btl_h4EfLj5_RBBhq0lLfnf0PUGmHZTpmo8jxP1MvxuosvvozGpJQWbFNjbe0u0I6nvTK8MhdBDzqdpKD9LQM6jU9vHKmZjazrwbRUzFxzrcMO4xQxBdULoOdTVe1pZdTM8IfEQFAtscFPN9n3xVU5VuLUqe5Q_mdLjujdNUk0KmSQdK1YpOiyBl8fCPtBNZUHwEIWoyI_IZLovKT2lmD0yBYCgz2MoJLP1f4qmxonjniTobxwvl4CY5Mw%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3fc52e7bb5384f7387726aa0bc86d382&_e=dJyUxEkrbpSbnwlIXD0szgNZmMxfmByBWRrc04fXWYrkrRXB0Ev8FV0JRTdOAbu_M5-gTQHHj13DnVbDqs0Rv_6rdi75Pf-6lylzE-tUieIZcNRhwyizuBUqOkwbSnTJ6ylXsTlSlc1P4uVJPosheJV2J7j5Btl_h4EfLj5_RBBhq0lLfnf0PUGmHZTpmo8jxP1MvxuosvvozGpJQWbFNjbe0u0I6nvTK8MhdBDzqdqNvUR9SdAFzwoOzCoRy63JRtgZWYlC0CLveAU03IbcUAPXQGnCvKixXcKWSZO0LRQmN8LAml9Lc_uOgKAL4fJhPcl25gnFQLv0QH8lLN9ZrRxICOYoKBFo6HC1VvzkRsaiHS--XkxHCRGm1KHc4iaYAAUx763YuaIZwvtffmzcKw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3fc52e7bb5384f7387726aa0bc86d382&_e=dJyUxEkrbpSbnwlIXD0szgNZmMxfmByBWRrc04fXWYrkrRXB0Ev8FV0JRTdOAbu_M5-gTQHHj13DnVbDqs0Rv_6rdi75Pf-6lylzE-tUieIZcNRhwyizuBUqOkwbSnTJ6ylXsTlSlc1P4uVJPosheJV2J7j5Btl_h4EfLj5_RBBhq0lLfnf0PUGmHZTpmo8jxP1MvxuosvvozGpJQWbFNjbe0u0I6nvTK8MhdBDzqdpEcDqFXenzE7vJl0AxEAuhrakzsyL68VEkj-fvdZbpj0IeIx1JGTrvKP4CVZDWHWeIbJs89-Kjdcvrc2zyEF2I__tK6NTocaPLKkLXutfT0ZTFKCINKJH3V0FVeLABynVoc_biZayp9Ya4z02zUamQxvzQZkvEoweHPppx--Ibkw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3fc52e7bb5384f7387726aa0bc86d382&_e=dJyUxEkrbpSbnwlIXD0szgNZmMxfmByBWRrc04fXWYrkrRXB0Ev8FV0JRTdOAbu_M5-gTQHHj13DnVbDqs0Rv_6rdi75Pf-6lylzE-tUieIZcNRhwyizuBUqOkwbSnTJ6ylXsTlSlc1P4uVJPosheJV2J7j5Btl_h4EfLj5_RBBhq0lLfnf0PUGmHZTpmo8jxP1MvxuosvvozGpJQWbFNjbe0u0I6nvTK8MhdBDzqdokFjDYjpmAlf6m0DoTuhBnI7AOQPjFnjPriJ4oUZ3BaVGHAUumXck9RA1J9utIbqy0SKZQJ2C0bOWTBAIFwAerUF6dMc6y9ubcxkreVnuttf2uW1YZiyuPD2DxxSLXZz6Jq_KtRdUD49t77badFdfVtzuc3Oa5Nb2drEUtCJADmQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3fc52e7bb5384f7387726aa0bc86d382&_e=dJyUxEkrbpSbnwlIXD0szgNZmMxfmByBWRrc04fXWYrkrRXB0Ev8FV0JRTdOAbu_M5-gTQHHj13DnVbDqs0Rv_6rdi75Pf-6lylzE-tUieIZcNRhwyizuBUqOkwbSnTJ6ylXsTlSlc1P4uVJPosheJV2J7j5Btl_h4EfLj5_RBBhq0lLfnf0PUGmHZTpmo8jxP1MvxuosvvozGpJQWbFNjbe0u0I6nvTK8MhdBDzqdql9VfLUY9niL9vRWj3hTjJDbYk3pyEPuTr3v-xZBZGQTNuSVn73jPnvdAoNVGSEZEQw_7tWu6VCEH7z_2wB02YKJxtb2_4VJy7FiKCBuUOoo6aLNEsnjlMHc_B54AxQVK7On0-muCdZLfsQwK0ndCraWRAFfvKPfSk8OdRyEoyNg%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3fc52e7bb5384f7387726aa0bc86d382&_e=dJyUxEkrbpSbnwlIXD0szgNZmMxfmByBWRrc04fXWYrkrRXB0Ev8FV0JRTdOAbu_M5-gTQHHj13DnVbDqs0Rv_6rdi75Pf-6lylzE-tUieIZcNRhwyizuBUqOkwbSnTJ6ylXsTlSlc1P4uVJPosheJV2J7j5Btl_h4EfLj5_RBBhq0lLfnf0PUGmHZTpmo8jxP1MvxuosvvozGpJQWbFNjbe0u0I6nvTK8MhdBDzqdoa0oPQFEJNmT9YR1P3L0D-PuszULVYafwIet5CQSx6o6XFaA3tQTWmjJ_lELMKWzcJNLCFWc_M2W4DTQiewGq97XQYWA-UVhIogDeSaO7E5cJEFj2l1ZL6d3VFZQybwLP9SkJQ0CBur_M0K6Z4nsmsBZdwYnWXdG2sJTOANunbcg%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **** |

If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bac8a0af9018425bad5efa6c4db62b38&_e=8tcxbROIepqGM6creH2t21ored-QBwQhTA5gyxvmhl2BOB8S2PG0HIg0SQ43f3IKaSuCIYg_YQdBROJc9Wq9cYeJAAh6KC6RzQ6BnbpZdE3a8QcX9Gw33Yd8OzVUiNfpp7nm1xhlJ573JcS9Qtu3mR-YddNu3ucs7z_QBBxQvDg2lQQjRLm8ZFcbJtZRBW6xQ7DLIZrJhdWvvYYJVgJCPL-dxK2kfYpg86eA-hkrnQ2eZwzstVSENyzBHp8FmWyTqQPcR96C-VVp-odbWB-5HLFNytV9RozkqoYmbciT191jf5Q6cGyqOtQ69Lq1yJM1ApLM3KVlQRgkrGFk0uuFzGlUYvo1o4n6CrLxriheDi7beGRzg4_ZaU6iTJwdiNcq9Noj3fhJ47HK3dCSyL1BaA%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. name: Vince Roncone
subject: Re: Phone Banking from Home (Zoom) - Vince
body:
Hello team,

I would like to add that we will be hosting virtual phone banks for the next 2 days! Throughout these days, Laura will be phone banking in the office from 10am-7pm.

Laura and I will be online (Zoom) from 12am-4pm. The virtual phone bank for today will last until 5pm. We will be using the same zoom links for all meetings. We would really like to see people join us as these are the last few days before the election. Additionally, Laura and I would greatly appreciate it if you could join us in the office. Thank you!

Kindly,
Vince

On Sun, Mar 3, 2024 at 2:37 PM Vince Roncone <[vince@lauraforcongress.org](mailto:vince@lauraforcongress.org)> wrote:

>
>

>
>

>
>

>
>
> <https://us02web.zoom.us/j/86110802181?pwd=ZDZHbXROK0FtOVVYemR4d1ZnUWhGQT09>
>
>

>
>

>

> Sincerely,
> Vince
> 323-219-1417

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Missouri is our most cost-effective opportunity to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Your donation stretches five times further here than it does in Texas or Florida.
#
Peter — did you know that Missouri is our most cost-effective opportunity to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat this November? Here’s why:
1. **Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his Senate seat with only 51% of the vote. After he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6, he became the least popular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election this year — with even lower approval ratings than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott.
2. **We’re building the grassroots movement that can defeat Josh Hawley.** After outraising Hawley in 2023 and earning major endorsements from groups like the Missouri AFL-CIO, End Citizens United, and League of Conservation Voters, we’re proving that Lucas Kunce is a real force to be reckoned with in this election. Multiple polls have proved it too — already finding this race between Lucas and Hawley in a _statistical tie._
3. **Every $1 here in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida.** Because of our state’s small media markets, we’ll be able to reach Missourians with Lucas’ message early and often for a fraction of what it would cost in those other big states.

We’re building the record-breaking, people-powered movement that can defeat Josh Hawley and elect a real warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. But the only way we’ll be able to get our election-winning message in front of voters is with support from real people like you. **So we’re asking:**
**[Will you add a donation of any amount — even just $3 — today? clean_body: Your donation stretches five times further here than it does in Texas or Florida. Peter — did you know that Missouri is our most cost-effective opportunity to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat this November? Here’s why: 1. Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable. In 2018, he won his Senate seat with only 51% of the vote. After he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6, he became the least popular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election this year — with even lower approval ratings than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott. 2. We’re building the grassroots movement that can defeat Josh Hawley. After outraising Hawley in 2023 and earning major endorsements from groups like the Missouri AFL-CIO, End Citizens United, and League of Conservation Voters, we’re proving that Lucas Kunce is a real force to be reckoned with in this election. Multiple polls have proved it too — already finding this race between Lucas and Hawley in a statistical tie. 3. Every $1 here in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida. Because of our state’s small media markets, we’ll be able to reach Missourians with Lucas’ message early and often for a fraction of what it would cost in those other big states. We’re building the record-breaking, people-powered movement that can defeat Josh Hawley and elect a real warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. But the only way we’ll be able to get our election-winning message in front of voters is with support from real people like you. So we’re asking: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: This is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for real, everyday people — and we really can’t afford to waste it. Thanks for being part of our movement, Team Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This week was a great reminder
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5846%2E5257348%2EhY9j6b ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

For my entire career, I’ve fought hard to get results.

As an assistant U.S. attorney, that meant forming the first federal
environmental crimes unit to successfully prosecute toxic polluters. As a
state senator, that meant writing the legislation to build Los Angeles
Metro Rail’s Gold Line, update school textbooks, and create a California
Patient Bill of Rights. As a member of Congress, it’s meant passing the
Affordable Care Act, funding affordable housing in California,
investigating and impeaching Donald Trump, and serving on the January 6
Committee.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240303_AM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=5846%2E5257348%2EhY9j6b ]I’m running hard through the final 48 hours of this primary to be
California’s next U.S. Senator. Can you pitch in
$3 to
help?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240303_AM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=5846%2E5257348%2EhY9j6b ]DONATE
$3

There’s no better reminder of what I’m fighting for in this campaign than
this past week in Washington. Republicans in the Senate just killed an
effort to protect in vitro fertilization, and the Supreme Court agreed to
hear Trump’s bogus claim of immunity — and therefore delay his trial,
possibly until after the election.

Derek,
I’m determined to restore our rights and freedoms, including reproductive
freedom and voting rights, and just as determined to protect our democracy
in case justice delayed by the courts results in justice being denied and
Trump gets off scot-free.

And I’m going to deliver for the American people. MAGA Republicans thrive
on dysfunction. Trump thrives on dysfunction. What Trump and Speaker
Johnson don’t want is someone like me joining the U.S. Senate, where we
can abolish the filibuster, stop Senate Republicans from slowing us down,
and deliver the progress the American people deserve.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=mar2024_abs_em.AiZCIe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240303_AM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=5846%2E5257348%2EhY9j6b ]Together, we’re going to win this Senate race and move our country
forward. We have 48 HOURS LEFT: Chip in if you can.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em.4fd6uj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240303_AM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=5846%2E5257348%2EhY9j6b ]EXPRESS DONATE

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsOb7EPipN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osOb7EPipN

Dear
Fellow Patriot,
If you
opened this email because you remember my playing days with the
Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

Having
you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey
Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we
battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees...
...well,
as they say, "Those were the days."
But this
email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought
I'd be writing to you.

Today,
I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a
seat in the United States Senate.
Today,
I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that
folks will be talking about for generations to come.
Because
when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s
weren't as good as we tend to first remember.
Baseball
was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that
had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy
after another.
I'm
running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is
starting to look a lot like 1970s America.
You
remember what it was like:
- Not
only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could
only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate
numbers.Remember?
- Eleven
Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in
Munich by terrorists.Remember?
-
Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists
in Iran.Remember??
Democrat
policies had brought America to its knees.
And now,
as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's déjà vu all over again."
There's
fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime,
homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding
and for the first time causing more people to leave California.
Joe
Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one
bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to
say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and
dependent.
And I
wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best
days are behind us."
But
listen, here's something I also want you to remember...
We
Republicans pulled our country out of that 1970's Democratic
malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.
We put
classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did.
And
America became a shining city upon a hill once more.
We can do
that again.
It starts
by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California.
But
there's no way I can pull it off without you.
That's
why I'm asking you to rush in your $35 donation today
I'm sorry
for the urgency but the primary is in less than three months and
here's where things stand...
In March,
I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November
general election.
Adam
Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on
his heels for the #2 spot.
Once
we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him
in November.
Why?
First...
I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can
tell you -- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've
never seen before.
They are
hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters
in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of
California...
I know we
can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win.
Second...
you know I'm not a career politician.
But I do
have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in
California...
...name
recognition.
I'm no
Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to
President Reagan.
But
California voters know me.
And Adam
Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how
quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race.
As I'm
writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points
separating us.
We've got
a shot -- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in
the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election.
But there
are just three months left until the primary.
And the
giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of
that time trying to bury me and our common sense message.
When you
rush back your Garvey for Senate campaign contribution of $35 or
more...
...you're
helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers,
EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message:
You don't
have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less
safe, less prosperous, and less free.
This race
is the toughest in the nation.
But they
say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball.
And you
know I've done that plenty of times.
Now I'm
ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -- win in
California as a common sense Republican.
But I
can't do it without you.
I'm
fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake
-- I'm not just taking the field for Californians.
When we
win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical
Adam Schiff...
...we
start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country
desperately needs.
It all
depends on you!
You can
do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can
step up to the plate with me and take a swing for the thrill of
victory. Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're
winning for all of America.
Thank you
and God Bless,

Steve
Garvey

Republican for United States Senate

P.S. It's
the bottom of the 9th and Republicans desperately need a homerun.
We simply can't let another election slip through our fingers
while Democrats go on destroying our country. With your help, I
know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the
Republican Comeback Rally America needs. But the primary is in
just three months. So please rush campaign contribution of $35 or
more as soon as you can. Thank you! -Steve

DONATE

PAID FOR
BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

This member-led organization is part of our nationwide ceasefire movement. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWtixeI4WA9b2wZlyB-AJbRlG2kiURzHcB8K5KO2M9cvi_LpEThhccONLv_STUCqLEuGNylutAfrVkbXKTTJ-furlE_4xoGqqPjShIfc1tMR6WKSxgkGMZWWmEeqgEhWErFPEU0Dj1Mm_n6hsyMhu2_ItY81s7Es2IEow5FQzJpiaZN8xDY7fH0-cv544jgLik2djsc-f5G6nV3HcQKdvQF1atVvytBjVnRZzZMHJo3lY/44c/nw_HNejOS8aNi4iOWy0Cag/h0/h001.404Jk3IYci-0pJqZJQlTWvBfzrisEkE1CzK9ghZZ5DA)

Friend, In our shared struggle for racial and economic justice, we need allies on the ground doing the hard work. Detroit Action is a grassroots member-led, Black-led multigenerational organization that is training community members on the tools needed to support and give back to their communities. Through direct action, voter registration, trainings, and civic engagement, Detroit Action is building working class power to challenge the root causes of poverty, and promote human dignity and development. Detroit Action is also part of our nationwide ceasefire movement, part of the push for housing justice across Michigan in the _Rent is Too Damn High_ coalition, and part of a new coalition to take on Michigan’s greedy energy utilities that keep cutting off our power. These struggles are interconnected, all part of building the society we deserve where everyone can thrive. [**Please make a donation to Detroit Action Education Fund to invest in Black-led organizing that empowers marginalized people in our shared struggle for economic and social justice.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJMygnURBN0IpH4Ic_KXdDzDQkUMYNV0q8f4tTmEWjQqIBmhs6xUpCUokPSN0lgqUB0DarvyJfHW6IgiVxshW0fYPnxCN_kQ0S-KVL6myq0_APXspa4LXVeATM9ew5uGVqdOiklt8VPCPZm81dUux91TbBTHiWT_19dQrtgfnitR7cmYq-xHrtEJrW3SqtUEU6j3TwGcZQ2qjKvzCCgM0zXXnyoZACzS2PWYfAUh42cvevyw0tSBLjb3lJL1kLwpnW_RejG-CjR5fn_eqdpbkPlww-LMHGH033_pxIpbGmx9zaFF6rxfwgjM5wzWRZ1CQmhoPLqRFE8ajePSYLVsqw-a5eBDMngOhaDa9glZ89bjsgBg_-hp0fzKtSIwmdY6ECm_zvlEfcq6yJ3NV-5Uqsdw/44c/nw_HNejOS8aNi4iOWy0Cag/h1/h001.vShZqy9xP-Mq-U6OdWrRVIW99TFrMwSWAA3kYk9vu9c) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Detroit Action Education Fund_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJMygnURBN0IpH4Ic_KXdDzDQkUMYNV0q8f4tTmEWjQqKmJHjycpIl2e9owIF-WGmpO8Sjcrxt14F7UlH3uxtDflUAuP72c451nDuk-OOfj32n4Dl89T0MRZxkqrQEDR_qUBA_Uu_m9-iyfhBV7CWr3Q_25K1BvkuXjvlUQBiIp3sxAA1HxlCiUhxPnqWkq2etZgYM9V8IFfpvLry5kkLAPa-1AI3chDJ1M5zynKWC-7MhUy1SNWgtG-r7q5Ol2VSHKn3qzz2x3I_66A2_kM1-F7htP05neKF-rQDlPAydWTHpYFQW7ZsEYRhONSkNlxwAPZCR9ew1zK2mWITCAw2ZhHim9us5Ik5FnsVD7NjU4wRkypF_QHx7RykmcuZmg9_MeyXIxai_iXdjkuSLyTrMteSvEYf0rN7TJGndkYWna8nIW6CkMRLl2fdiiOWcbDij_6vy_XtQ4e8KVi-iBXiRcQ/44c/nw_HNejOS8aNi4iOWy0Cag/h2/h001.sAlsD5-oMeJHvgRVWopVA0RAl7qbmTuR32_sNvsJzyA)

Subject: Power our shared struggle for housing and economic justice
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Detroit Action is a critical ally, rooted in community, fighting for housing and economic justice while providing direct services to low-income residents in our shared struggle for equity.
This member-led organization is a leader on the _Rent is Too Damn High_ campaign, which is building power among renters and unhoused people across the state of Michigan.
Detroit Action is also part of our nationwide ceasefire movement, speaking out for our shared humanity and against oppression everywhere. As they wrote in a statement of solidarity: Palestinians “face the daily threat of state violence—a similar fate that Black and Brown Americans face in Detroit and other cities that have become over-policed and under-resourced.”
A multigenerational group of Black and brown, low and no-income, homeless and housing-insecure Michiganders, Detroit Action is challenging the root cause of poverty and racism. They’re demanding inclusion and investment for all marginalized communities that have been left behind.
[**Will you make a donation to Detroit Action Education Fund, a Black-led organization that is building working class power and empowering residents “to become victors instead of victims against the system”?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJMygnURBN0IpH4Ic_KXdDzDQkUMYNV0q8f4tTmEWjQqKPAm8o1c-5nMtv0LCZ1njVuBG68grnZusvQfhaLL3nGaBz-mrIBfy1ufkWjX72Ojv-pBhJmNAGWH3IjJVZsIjezvt1SfVLZ69A_E83XOYcgFJbE7kz5aPU0l6L5d6_zFPLBGpCceNQY_l3tVy-u7VJuEsdRpa2N5XACvTywSfJZ9OBEHqVQvtcOL9pYO4DxKmyJnkMETHpn1TfPpvmC9JFeSKDSjBlFFBjH-P5S3gLKYansnfh6itQ6Ne51CoQTa2mERhKFXFHu32DlI0G6ckoE6Yg1ggMendI-ofVYk2NdrQ7ovS4kS_9Ma7mbuYahE4GIU2TSVGuNY_rcboZphd8Qb1UNMdbUFdAXnc9iJjZ1A/44c/nw_HNejOS8aNi4iOWy0Cag/h8/h001.442gNKttZHsandCFUzQhN7zLWXrBSrwojZLYCoAKhQQ)

With a focus on leadership and development, Detroit Action is empowering young people through trainings, voter registration, and civic engagement, fostering a commitment to public service in the next generation of Detroiters.
Their leadership development and trainings focus on storytelling and lived experiences―centering the experiences of people of color to shape policy and power cultural organizing.
While focused on Michigan communities, **Detroit Action is challenging systems that harm all of us, and creating a just world where everyone has housing, healthcare, quality education, and a liveable environment**.
[**Make a donation to Detroit Action Education Fund today to empower local communities in our shared struggle for a ceasefire and for racial and economic justice for all.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJMygnURBN0IpH4Ic_KXdDzDQkUMYNV0q8f4tTmEWjQqJjBKbZqOvYXyVQIR95GUq11Pdc_DlohOKABT3UEqlppPQxElHvfApGkKChg695p3zoa08KUO40UNKdmNReYAlczCw-NuoqDzOLUWOxPizdCBfCzL83he9lrxtuockQCE_MxWt983YRxUpaD9w6e7Rr30Z2NoMfI9qOeQs5lQeUdDjpgeI3omJPuTLQdDm2zbhLlFx6fCmF71n7rarqYahteGRtOGKQSeifLE2Oe4Lzvm67oTWGqkrEZ3SZThk6Bs5yvZyjA3u_qtFoZ5SmciophWJaNusUn56kOhm7Uqdo_nHtYZ6S5qsxzQ80zlCC_4ONwz6Sdao3Ioj3TrTFCCiRVE-tdLtU6rn6sGrFUfwnlg/44c/nw_HNejOS8aNi4iOWy0Cag/h10/h001.djpafvhFTQfQDUyEeG-kbTO1kkGAbY63uez1QlhMg5o)

clean_body: This member-led organization is part of our nationwide ceasefire movement. | | | Friend, In our shared struggle for racial and economic justice, we need allies on the ground doing the hard work. Detroit Action is a grassroots member-led, Black-led multigenerational organization that is training community members on the tools needed to support and give back to their communities. Through direct action, voter registration, trainings, and civic engagement, Detroit Action is building working class power to challenge the root causes of poverty, and promote human dignity and development. Detroit Action is also part of our nationwide ceasefire movement, part of the push for housing justice across Michigan in the Rent is Too Damn High coalition, and part of a new coalition to take on Michigan’s greedy energy utilities that keep cutting off our power. These struggles are interconnected, all part of building the society we deserve where everyone can thrive. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Detroit Action Education Fund | | | | | | | | | | Let’s keep celebrating and uplifting Black-led movements for change year-round. This member-led organization is a leader on the Rent is Too Damn High campaign, which is building power among renters and unhoused people across the state of Michigan. Detroit Action is also part of our nationwide ceasefire movement, speaking out for our shared humanity and against oppression everywhere. As they wrote in a statement of solidarity: Palestinians “face the daily threat of state violence—a similar fate that Black and Brown Americans face in Detroit and other cities that have become over-policed and under-resourced.” A multigenerational group of Black and brown, low and no-income, homeless and housing-insecure Michiganders, Detroit Action is challenging the root cause of poverty and racism. They’re demanding inclusion and investment for all marginalized communities that have been left behind. With a focus on leadership and development, Detroit Action is empowering young people through trainings, voter registration, and civic engagement, fostering a commitment to public service in the next generation of Detroiters. _**ALL HELL BREAKS LOOSE ON SUPER TUESDAY!**_
In less than 48 hours, we’ll have our BIGGEST victory of 2024.
But as you’re reading this message, Deranged Democrats are ramping up their desperate attacks on President Trump after his _**LANDSLIDE VICTORIUES!**_
They want to SABOTAGE our historic movement...
I’ve just been ERASED from the ballot in a THIRD state.
Biden & his CORRUPT allies have weaponized the government against me.
But worst of all? His corrupt regime has completely **DESTROYED** our country.
If we don’t win back the White House in 2024, we’re FINISHED.
This will be the LAST election we have in _HISTORY!_

subject: This is what life in Rick Scott's America would look like:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
downright terrifying
| | |
---
Friend, two years ago, Rick Scott unveiled a 12-point plan to "rescue" America. **His vision for our country is downright terrifying.**
This is what life in Rick Scott's America would look like:
* Ending all federal legislation after five years — **that includes everything from Social Security and Medicare to gun safety laws and the Civil Rights Act.**

* **Formalizing hateful discrimination** against LGBTQ+ Americans.

* Totally **eroding voting rights** , making it harder for Americans to access the ballot in every single state.

* **Banning abortions nationwide** , jeopardizing patients' health, and destroying our reproductive freedoms.

* Pushing an agenda of **Christian nationalism** , all but ending the separation of church and state as we know it.

Rick Scott wants to build a different reality — and he's trying to force that extremist agenda on all of us. _But thankfully, American voters aren't buying into his lies and fear mongering._
**Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority. Recent polling shows that this race is a statistical tie! name: VoteVets.org
subject: Attacks on IVF target wounded Veterans, too
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
If you, a family member, or a friend are a Veteran and have used IVF, we want to hear from you.
#
We need your help, Derek.
We’ve seen some disgusting stuff from the GOP in our day.
But their effort to restrict IVF as part of the broader campaign to ban abortion and restrict the ability of servicemembers and all Americans to decide when to have families is up there with some of the worst of them.
We know this is really personal. We respect it if you don’t want to talk about it. But we know that a lot of Veterans suffered grievous wounds in combat, and that they depend on IVF to have kids.
As we push back on the GOP, those stories are incredibly important.
So: If you, a family member, or a friend are a Veteran and have used IVF, we want to hear from you.
We won’t share your story without your permission, so don’t worry about that. All we’re asking is for you to reach out.
**[Use this link and add your contact information. A member of our team will follow up.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240303_vv_ivf/?source=em240303-1-30?refcode2=24944.3013755.uKGh-a&akid=24944%2E3013755%2EuKGh-a)**
| [SIGN ON HERE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240303_vv_ivf/?source=em240303-1-30?refcode2=24944.3013755.uKGh-a&akid=24944%2E3013755%2EuKGh-a)
---

[At this point, if I don't do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my fundraising efforts, but Republicans may never win a race again. Help SAVE AMERICA now!](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c6f87e24698340e28632764e18837984&_e=-kaLMY_jj9aXmh4FO_FNhTsjNgBmIxOYlQFYw4otU58d24qNsjl3KFEpkvfxO18rT98NixHKWhM3QDVNYuHrQaT8MrvxwwuH7hIlSYX7BbpAuwmSIp2iZqXcrbyvbb-wr7XJSCv-EXsVDZXqa8AWMH5-yJBFUAqIvEueEWgYi6ptYV8DVkKnAPcarTc2S2TKJ5tYUpFU-ktVZ-2riz4Y_BMtvbsbgrpwph4XnIsT19J0_k3Qh-wIMWaXpNkmvJRsFLMsOjaMZvX35_-MIjgH2QTHNk70NEt-WmyDdCs3R1mbGbhhJ5SeU0hqf5Gn_lqAgKRAWJT8nyFynC6lRU-_bIusQS970wVl53IhmvPmrnUNs7PWHD6Mq1KlMJKF5c2v3uI1r7-HLCrti0e39UY3Rbn_R6ROdM0hjYgUT3aY_Hk%3D)
If the Democrats can beat us in November, I can guarantee you Republicans won't have a chance to beat them for a long time.

**Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight.**

I'm one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that--that's why they're dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can't stop them - no one can.

[If you chip in just $25 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and derail the Biden-Schumer plan to destroy our nation.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c6f87e24698340e28632764e18837984&_e=-kaLMY_jj9aXmh4FO_FNhTsjNgBmIxOYlQFYw4otU58d24qNsjl3KFEpkvfxO18rT98NixHKWhM3QDVNYuHrQaT8MrvxwwuH7hIlSYX7BbpAuwmSIp2iZqXcrbyvbb-wr7XJSCv-EXsVDZXqa8AWMH5-yJBFUAqIvEueEWgYi6ptYV8DVkKnAPcarTc2S2TKJ5tYUpFU-ktVZ-2riz4Y_BMtvbsbgrpwph4XnIsT19J0_k3Qh-wIMWaXpNkmvJRsFLMsOjaMZvX35_-MIjgH2XszykobUT7oF58BMeDsQwjiLcFN-7cVLVMxbPdkgbkUuJFx9epxCt2dAifVoYDXEBQKKDrkDpPlWcVUcF_6KC4zQg40jNT39ni4uas789TK57dpdybXnpEcTojtt85v8-de8Wrju5IgjBdMQuYBFn0%3D)

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**

economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.

Brandi Bradley will be joining us at our Watch Party at Wide Open Saloon in Sedalia on Super Tuesday. == | == | | == | Join us as we watch President Trump secure 15 states and American Samoa that vote on March 5th, cementing the President's path to victory at the Republican National Convention! | | == | I hope to see you on Super Tuesday and I hope we can count on you to attend your caucuses on March 7th and 9th! We look forward to seeing you in person on Tuesday! Best, | == | Laurel Imer Candidate Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado == | | == | == == == | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee. www.ImerForColorado.com This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization and approval by Laurel Imer | | | | | | | Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC | 16606 W 9th Ave, Golden, CO 80401 | (202) 849-7530 | prodigyconsultinggroupllc.org | | Sent by mailto:info@prodigyconsultinggroupllc.ccsend.com powered by

Friend,

This is the first and last email I’ll send you.

I’m a little hesitant to reach out to you like this.

**However, my back is against the wall, and your response to this email will decide everything.**

My name is Rob Bresnahan Jr. You may not know me well, but I’m a fifth-generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian who took over my family’s electrical contracting business at the age of 19 years old. I graduated from the University of Scranton, and I’ve created life-supporting jobs for more than 150 Pennsylvanian families.

After that, I started a company with the goal to reinvest in my community by rehabilitating historic buildings, breathing life back into local downtown areas, and providing innovative spaces for the next generation of entrepreneurs.

I have dedicated my life to helping the community that raised me into the hard-working man that I am today.

**Now, I’m also the Republican Candidate in a MUST WIN race in Northeast Pennsylvania, a district that will certainly decide who controls Washington, D.C.**

Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and my opponent, Matt Cartwright, are going to flood MILLIONS of Democratic money into this race.

**[>> That’s why I’m humbly asking you to chip in just a few bucks today<<](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=e8874eff93824fd086eb19d010f6ce71&_e=H-LsqrVye9jldznxUKdp39MqpfzTY37VRruXQhpUau1O9o9FQxrOQ3wmgHJqWII2ZjsuInVH25rJgatN4eVYotlbbXiqHCNTTsq_eKBOg97nO7ZvUQKzCuCgXaXWQxQFSan-QNrJnnUBBBZKH51Ha7EoRkcBIBueLmzKD1fGCW649RRa1qhnGXvnE8j4L4iROD8k63cWDW_IbZ52dqesq1cxh7hHvvolBfL3dKq0vammG56GU-jRnWkTMpZ0hbs2moMX4PZxhND_nPq7DDciqdMOfN6DAI07G4Stnj2uXq7j5cncp9xS6ydC28f23EIy5OhAJF2QaoF2-QRpeD1qXGxk7GtU80g6nfkyt-PLOyDMN2_GR__88K2YhnWWr8KJVb8yyhkxRvHaZi_3WSXOAQ%3D%3D)**
I’m the kind of guy who puts his head down and gets the work done without asking for help. **[But it’s going to take a strong grassroots effort in order for us to flip this seat.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=e8874eff93824fd086eb19d010f6ce71&_e=H-LsqrVye9jldznxUKdp39MqpfzTY37VRruXQhpUau1O9o9FQxrOQ3wmgHJqWII2ZjsuInVH25rJgatN4eVYotlbbXiqHCNTTsq_eKBOg97nO7ZvUQKzCuCgXaXWQxQFSan-QNrJnnUBBBZKH51Ha7EoRkcBIBueLmzKD1fGCW649RRa1qhnGXvnE8j4L4iROD8k63cWDW_IbZ52dqesq1cxh7hHvvolBfL3dKq0vammG56GU-jRnWkTMpZ0hbs2FPVme9C5sk0lpyXj6WmJWW6DHNSKU3thHcBOwmiN47DhBQXCJSJBMeGDDQqHGR8V5mpx-IXLglAgbEUQi50ioCNaCqWgzYvPLAM84aCb93eQve8MJ-WnFJbbO5aSQut0SAARuf3hong4r5Xx_a99XQ%3D%3D)**

Democrats won’t stop doing everything in their power to stop us – regular hard-working Americans like you and me – from winning. Democrats don’t like us at all.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek,
**FIRST:** We worked together to beat the odds, flip PA blue 🔵, and elect John Fetterman.
**THEN:** John got to work in the Senate fighting for the working people of Pennsylvania. 💪
**NOW:** We’re hoping to start March off as strong as possible so we can keep supporting John’s work.
**[John’s counting on this team to keep it going strong as we get closer to November. Do you think you could chip in your first $5, $25, or whatever feels right today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240303-1?refcode=em20240303-1-8816&refcode2=8816_434096_eyztjN&akid=8816%2E434096%2EeyztjN)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240303-1?refcode=em20240303-8816&refcode2=8816_434096_eyztjN&akid=8816%2E434096%2EeyztjN)**
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240303-8816-footer&t=1&refcode2=8816_434096_eyztjN&akid=8816%2E434096%2EeyztjN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8816%2E434096%2EeyztjN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8816%2E434096%2EeyztjN)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: Hi Derek, FIRST: We worked together to beat the odds, flip PA blue 🔵, and elect John Fetterman. THEN: John got to work in the Senate fighting for the working people of Pennsylvania. 💪 NOW: We’re hoping to start March off as strong as possible so we can keep supporting John’s work. Thank you for everything, Team Fetterman HQ 💛 | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

name: Pramila Jayapal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s clear: Voters are NOT happy with the handling of the war in Gaza — and I agree with them.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240303-3575-footer&t=1&akid=3575%2E420207%2EslMu3o)
Peter,
On Tuesday night, more than 100,000 Michigan voters chose ‘Uncommitted’ in the Democratic presidential primary. Many of us have been sounding the alarm for months. But last night, Michigan voters sent a very clear message:
Voters are NOT happy with the handling of the war in Gaza — and I agree with them.
The fragile coalition we worked so hard to build in 2020 to take back the White House is at risk of falling apart if we don’t immediately rebuild relationships and listen to our progressive base.
We shouldn’t be trying to figure out how to get Republican voters to vote for us, we should be working to get _our own base_ back to us. If we don’t pay attention to their moral outrage and shift course, they will swing right out to the sidelines.
There’s still time to change this dynamic, but it’s going to take ALL of us making our voices heard to make the drastic strategy shift we need.
[**If you stand with me, please join me and over 100,000 Michigan voters and demand an immediate ceasefire in Gaza. You can add your name here.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-ceasefire-sign-on_bpr/?source=em20240303-3575&t=2&akid=3575%2E420207%2EslMu3o)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-ceasefire-sign-on_bpr/?source=em20240303-3575&t=3&akid=3575%2E420207%2EslMu3o)**
With solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240303-3575-footer&t=4&refcode2=3575_420207_slMu3o&akid=3575%2E420207%2EslMu3o)**

name: Hill Harper
subject: GoFundMe isn’t a health insurance plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
It’s time we passed the universal healthcare system Americans deserve.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD)
GoFundMe isn’t a health insurance plan, Peter — but did you know _one-third_ of all money raised on the platform goes towards medical bills?
This dynamic is unconscionable. No one should go bankrupt for the crime of seeking life-saving medical care, or have to rely so heavily on the generosity of others just to ease the burden of their medical expenses.
That’s why I’m fighting unapologetically for a single-payer system that provides universal coverage to all residents, regardless of income, employment status, or pre-existing conditions. **Because in the wealthiest country in the history of the world, healthcare should be a RIGHT, not a privilege.**
**[I know you’re with me on this, so please: Chip in $5 today to elect me to the Senate so I can fight for the progressive, universal healthcare system the American people deserve.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/686?t=3&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD)**
Look, I’m no doctor (even though I played one on TV), but I was raised by two incredible physicians who emphasized the importance of quality, accessible healthcare.
And Peter, it never hit closer to home than when I received my own cancer diagnosis in 2010. I was fortunate enough to have my union cover my medical expenses back then, but it’s infuriating that **our leaders _still_ haven’t addressed the root cause of the problem with healthcare in America: private equity and profit motive.**
It’s what allowed the cost of life-saving drugs like insulin to soar nearly 600% over the last 20 years.
It’s what has caused Americans’ collective medical debt to balloon to over $200 billion — nearly the size of Greece’s economy.
And of course, it’s what causes nearly half a million Americans to file for bankruptcy every single year, just because they needed to see a doctor and get help.
**Enough is enough. It’s time our leaders started putting people over profits in this country, and I can’t think of a better place to start than the American healthcare system.**
**[So, how about it? Chip in $5 _today_ to give my campaign the resources we need to win this race and fight for the universal healthcare system we deserve.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/697?t=5&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/598?t=6&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD) [DONATE $25 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/692?t=7&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD) [DONATE $50 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/600?t=8&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD) [DONATE $100 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/601?t=9&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD) [DONATE $250 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/602?t=10&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/603?t=11&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD)
---
My father, grandfather, and uncle lost their battles with cancer, and I count myself lucky to be alive because I caught mine early and got the support I needed. Every American deserves that chance, and I’ll fight like hell in the Senate to deliver it.
Thank you for being part of our movement,
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/603?t=12&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_em_footer?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=13&refcode2=1028_62735_GYSRMD&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=14&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1028%2E62735%2EGYSRMD)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

subject: Dangerous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
The fate of reproductive rights in our country is in our hands.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2191%2E552475%2Et6Jcck)
**FIRST:** The Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , ripping away a constitutional right that generations of Americans have known their entire lives.
**THEN:** Our opponent David McCormick called the overturning of _Roe_ “a huge victory” -- confirming his dangerous, anti-choice agenda.
**NOW:** Anti-choice Republicans are trying to ban abortion nationwide -- and McCormick is in lockstep with them. **He even said that he supports an extreme abortion ban without exceptions for rape or incest.**
[**What happens in 2024 in Pennsylvania’s Senate race could decide the fate of reproductive rights across the Nation. So we have to ask: Can you rush any amount right now to keep this seat and the Senate in Democratic hands?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240303-1?refcode=em20240303-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2191_552475_t6Jcck&akid=2191%2E552475%2Et6Jcck)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: The Koch network is targeting me in Nevada
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| BREAKING: The Koch network is flooding NV with ads
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2147%2E35263%2EePnwmD)
Peter, it’s Jacky Rosen, and I have urgent news: **The Koch network’s super PAC JUST announced that it will blanket Nevada airwaves with $600,000 worth of ads to prop up Mitch McConnell’s handpicked GOP opponent in my race, Sam Brown.** **Republicans know that the path to Senate control and the White House runs right through Nevada, so they're pulling out all the stops to defeat me.** I need your immediate support if I'm going to fight back and defend this seat. name: Katie Porter
subject: Asking one final time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken corporate PAC money and rejects federal lobbyist money,
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=38634%2E3422442%2EH7-M22)
Derek,
This campaign truly, truly has been funded by grassroots support. **I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken corporate PAC money and rejects federal lobbyist money,** yet we’ve been able to stay neck and neck with our opponent who had stockpiled decades of corporate cash. **99% of our contributions are of $100 or less, and our average donation is under $30.**
**[So now, just 48 hours to Election Day, I’m asking if you can make your first and most meaningful contribution?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240303-1?refcode=em20240303-38634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38634_3422442_H7-M22&akid=38634%2E3422442%2EH7-M22)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240303-1?refcode=em20240303-38634&refcode2=38634_3422442_H7-M22&akid=38634%2E3422442%2EH7-M22)
**We still have time to increase our digital ad spend and reach undecided voters, of which polls say there are *millions* of.** In such a tight race, it really could come down to who can turnout their supporters, and so every reminder we can send to folks is going to make a difference.
I wouldn’t ask if there wasn’t still time to make a difference. **If we don’t pull through on Tuesday, I will be out of Congress for good.** Now could be your final chance to help us out.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240303-1?refcode=em20240303-38634&refcode2=38634_3422442_H7-M22&akid=38634%2E3422442%2EH7-M22)
Thanks so much for your past and continued support,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240303-38634&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38634_3422442_H7-M22&akid=38634%2E3422442%2EH7-M22)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=38634%2E3422442%2EH7-M22)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=38634%2E3422442%2EH7-M22)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

Senate Democrats are defending 23 seats across the country this year, friend — and if we lose just one, the GOP could take their radical agenda nationwide.
We can't afford any mistakes this year. There's simply too much at stake. Far-right leaders are pushing new attacks on reproductive rights, Social Security, voting rights and everything else that we care about. Their agenda is totally out-of-touch with the American public — and extremely dangerous. **In Alabama, the state Supreme Court has even attacked access to IVF treatments!**
But New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in DECADES. And now, they're scheming to defeat Kirsten Gillibrand and retake the Senate. **That's why it's absolutely critical that we get feedback from our most engaged supporters to make sure our strategy is airtight.**
Based on your status as an active Democrat and supporter, we've specifically chosen you to represent 43614 in our exclusive Democratic Focus Group. **But this invite expires at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and we’re really counting on your feedback — so please respond now.**

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: Why I won’t take corporate PAC $$$:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Because you deserve better.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80220458/458727058/-849459103?refcode=ea.c2aa06a4-83d9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.c2aa06a4-83d9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmFhMDZhNC04M2Q5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwlrdpQxiE5Bf6boiZ9baSXi-WNK1oTkq52x00oGvF0=&emci=7f2921d8-21d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c2aa06a4-83d9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
---
Hey y’all — Sometimes I think about what our government might look like if we had representatives who were only accountable to the people — not powerful special-interest groups or lobbying organizations. I believe leaders would listen more. Act with more consideration for their communities. Work harder to address folks’ needs. And frankly just do better all around. **It’s why I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money for this campaign.** When I’m in the Senate, I want you to know that I’m _only_ there to serve you. **Unfortunately, my far-right opponent feels exactly the opposite.** She’s benefitted from more than a million dollars from the NRA, and repeatedly voted _against_ lifesaving gun violence prevention measures. And she’s taken another million + from the pharmaceutical lobby and health PACs, then does their bidding in Washington, even at Americans’ expense. **Meanwhile, she voted in favor of the GOP “tax cuts” that gave a permanent break to corporations.** Folks, Marsha Blackburn’s done just about nothing for us. But for her corporate pals? She sure seems to be a reliable vote in the Senate. clean_body: Because you deserve better. | Hey y’all — Sometimes I think about what our government might look like if we had representatives who were only accountable to the people — not powerful special-interest groups or lobbying organizations. I believe leaders would listen more. Act with more consideration for their communities. Work harder to address folks’ needs. And frankly just do better all around. It’s why I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money for this campaign. When I’m in the Senate, I want you to know that I’m only there to serve you. Unfortunately, my far-right opponent feels exactly the opposite. She’s benefitted from more than a million dollars from the NRA, and repeatedly voted against lifesaving gun violence prevention measures. And she’s taken another million + from the pharmaceutical lobby and health PACs, then does their bidding in Washington, even at Americans’ expense. Meanwhile, she voted in favor of the GOP “tax cuts” that gave a permanent break to corporations. Folks, Marsha Blackburn’s done just about nothing for us. But for her corporate pals? She sure seems to be a reliable vote in the Senate. There are only 100 Senators, and every last one of them should be voting with the people’s interests in mind. I always will. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Team, In less than 48 hours, Coloradans vote in the Super Tuesday Presidential Primary — marking the first time Donald Trump is on the ballot since 2020. **Make no mistake: Donald Trump and Jason Crow couldn’t be more different.**
* While Trump actively encourages Russia to attack our NATO allies, Jason was at the Munich Security Conference affirming our country’s support to our partners.

* While Trump spreads his Big Lie, Jason is fighting for freedom and democracy.

* While Trump rallied to kill a border deal, Jason is governing to fix our broken immigration system.

* While Trump mocks our service members, Jason is fighting to keep our nation safe and ensure their service is not in vain.

* While Trump is working to get more unregulated guns on the streets, Jason is pushing hard to solve our country’s gun violence crisis and prevent further senseless violence.

* **While Trump works to enrich himself and his allies, Jason is in office to serve the public interest — working to deliver results for our families, communities, and country.**

With Donald Trump back on the ballot, we need leaders who have stood up to his extremism before and are ready to do it again.
