clean_body: | Team, In less than 48 hours, Coloradans vote in the Super Tuesday Presidential Primary — marking the first time Donald Trump is on the ballot since 2020. Make no mistake: Donald Trump and Jason Crow couldn’t be more different. While Trump actively encourages Russia to attack our NATO allies, Jason was at the Munich Security Conference affirming our country’s support to our partners. While Trump spreads his Big Lie, Jason is fighting for freedom and democracy. While Trump rallied to kill a border deal, Jason is governing to fix our broken immigration system. While Trump mocks our service members, Jason is fighting to keep our nation safe and ensure their service is not in vain. While Trump is working to get more unregulated guns on the streets, Jason is pushing hard to solve our country’s gun violence crisis and prevent further senseless violence. While Trump works to enrich himself and his allies, Jason is in office to serve the public interest — working to deliver results for our families, communities, and country. With Donald Trump back on the ballot, we need leaders who have stood up to his extremism before and are ready to do it again. ---
**WE TOLD YOU:** a new poll shows Sherrod Brown within the margin of error of losing his seat to any of his three potential Republican challengers.

**WE TOLD YOU:** Brown’s seat is expected to be one of the closest, most important races in 2024!

**WE TOLD YOU:** We missed our end-of-month ‘Battleground Senate Fund” by almost $1,500.
_We CANNOT let mess-ups like these become our new normal, not when we’re fighting to save our razor-thin Senate majority!_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13255%2E878179%2EW1w7GK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13255%2E878179%2EW1w7GK).**

---
### **We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot**
**Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.****With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.****The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.****As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.****The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.****Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.****Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality.**
---
### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **We Did The Impossible**
---
**We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024**
---
---
|
---
#### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon
---
#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_

---
**The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!****Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.****This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.****Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.****Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska.**
---
---
|
---
### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65e4fecb64294c6c755570b8&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65e4fa9645ef4e0e1840331f&l=en-US&s=WWeBxkIW8PFGM3ok18NdIdI8TkU%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**

body:
Join us March 16th in Lakewood | |

|
### You're invited! Join Tristan Rader & Friends at Our Annual March Fundraiser!

Dear ,

We are thrilled to invite you to the kick-off fundraiser for **Tristan Rader for State Representative** , marking the beginning of our journey to victory! As we embark on this campaign without corporate funding, your generous support becomes the cornerstone of our success. This gathering is not just about raising funds; it's about coming together as a community, dedicated to making a real impact for the people of Cleveland and Lakewood. Whether you're a host, sponsor, backer, or guest, your contribution at any level empowers our mission. Remember, come as you are and give what you can—all are welcome in this people-powered campaign. Let's unite for an afternoon of solidarity, discussion, and commitment to a brighter future. **[RSVP today!](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=e86b171b49&e=869bcf0641)**

A very special thank you to our hosts: **Dr. Matthew Badgett, Sarah Badgett, State Rep. Michael Skindell, Mayor Meghan George, Michael Berler, DL Meckes, Bill Grulich, and Marc Dann.** There is still time to join the host committee!

**[If you can't make it, you can still give to the effort by clicking this link! We GREATLY appreciate your contribution! ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=291eee6c40&e=869bcf0641)**

_Location:_
**Home of Dr. Matthew & Sarah Badgett,
13488 Lake Ave, Lakewood, OH 44107
**
_Date & Time: _
**Saturday, March 16th** |**3:00PM to 5:00PM

Host - $1,000
Sponsor - $500
Backer - $100
Guest - $25**

$15 - Covers food
$0-15 - All are welcome!

clean_body: Join us March 16th in Lakewood | | | | | | You're invited! Join Tristan Rader & Friends at Our Annual March Fundraiser! Dear , We are thrilled to invite you to the kick-off fundraiser for Tristan Rader for State Representative , marking the beginning of our journey to victory! As we embark on this campaign without corporate funding, your generous support becomes the cornerstone of our success. This gathering is not just about raising funds; it's about coming together as a community, dedicated to making a real impact for the people of Cleveland and Lakewood. Whether you're a host, sponsor, backer, or guest, your contribution at any level empowers our mission. Remember, come as you are and give what you can—all are welcome in this people-powered campaign. Let's unite for an afternoon of solidarity, discussion, and commitment to a brighter future. A very special thank you to our hosts: Dr. Matthew Badgett, Sarah Badgett, State Rep. Michael Skindell, Mayor Meghan George, Michael Berler, DL Meckes, Bill Grulich, and Marc Dann. There is still time to join the host committee! body:
Intro to Molly + Angel | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80223960/458731578/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240302Tuesday_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZTQ5ZmQ2LTg3ZDktZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljQn_Q6aKZ9JSlvl8QCzgnHto-pcQ4DCjTceEEApJQk=)

Hi Peter,

There are states right here in the U.S. in which it is now **dangerous to be a woman.** But the states with laws banning abortion and critical reproductive healthcare (mostly red states) are, unfortunately, not the same states being prioritized by Democratic institutions (mostly blue and purple states).

Texas is a great example of a purple state in which women are getting left behind. At Her Bold Move, we believe those women desperately need representation in the rooms where decisions are being made.

The primary election in Texas is happening TUESDAY, and we have endorsed candidates in some of the most important races who need support in their final stretch: [**Will you rush a last-minute donation of $20.24 or more right now to ensure our Texas candidates have what they need to reach voters over the next 2 days and make it through their primary election on TUESDAY?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80223961/458731579/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240302Tuesday_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_L1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZTQ5ZmQ2LTg3ZDktZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljQn_Q6aKZ9JSlvl8QCzgnHto-pcQ4DCjTceEEApJQk=)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80223962/458731581/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240302Tuesday_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZTQ5ZmQ2LTg3ZDktZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljQn_Q6aKZ9JSlvl8QCzgnHto-pcQ4DCjTceEEApJQk=)
---
✅ **Angel Carroll for Texas House District 52:** In this primary, Angel is the only woman of color, and the only candidate who has gone on record as pro-choice (her opponent has not made a public stance on this issue). Angel has firsthand experience with the Texas Juvenile Justice Advisory Board and the juvenile justice system. That experience has fueled her dedication to tackling the school-to-prison pipeline issue and crafting laws that improve outcomes for all students. Additionally, growing up in the district has equipped her to authentically and comprehensively represent the diverse needs and aspirations of every resident.

**Angel’s primary opponent has been silent on the issue of abortion.** In these times, we cannot afford to elect any Democratic candidates who have not gone on the record as pro-choice – especially in Texas (and especially when there’s a strong pro-choice option on the ballot). [**Will you rush a last-minute donation of $20.24 or more right now to ensure her campaign has what they need to reach voters over the next 2 days and get through their primary election on TUESDAY?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80223963/458731582/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240302Tuesday_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZTQ5ZmQ2LTg3ZDktZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljQn_Q6aKZ9JSlvl8QCzgnHto-pcQ4DCjTceEEApJQk=)

Angel has stated: _“I firmly support the right to safe and legal abortion, emphasizing the necessity to maintain women's control over their bodies.”**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80223964/458731583/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240302Tuesday_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZTQ5ZmQ2LTg3ZDktZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljQn_Q6aKZ9JSlvl8QCzgnHto-pcQ4DCjTceEEApJQk=)
---
✅ **Molly Cook for Texas Senate District 15:** Molly is an ER nurse, community organizer, and advocate for a more sustainable Texas. She recognizes that Texas needs a bold leader who is willing to stand up for the women in her state. If elected, she has plans to support statewide grassroots organizing within the Texas Senate to move the needle on abortion access. She is determined to end interpersonal violence, reduce gun violence, reduce maternal mortality rates (especially in Black communities and communities of color), and more.

[**Here’s the thing: In order to keep her ads running through Election Day, they need to raise an additional $5,200. Molly needs support ASAP – these final few hours are her last chance! Will you rush $20.24 or more immediately to help her campaign fill that gap and make sure as many voters as possible can see her ad on TV?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80223965/458731584/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240302Tuesday_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_L3&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZTQ5ZmQ2LTg3ZDktZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljQn_Q6aKZ9JSlvl8QCzgnHto-pcQ4DCjTceEEApJQk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.24 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80223968/458731585/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240302Tuesday_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_EB20.24&express_lane=true&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZTQ5ZmQ2LTg3ZDktZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ljQn_Q6aKZ9JSlvl8QCzgnHto-pcQ4DCjTceEEApJQk=)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: In honor of Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Dear friend,

Happy Women's History Month! Today, we celebrate not just the progress we've made but also acknowledge the journey ahead toward true gender equity. While we've seen inspiring milestones, like a record number of women in leadership roles in Congress, our work continues.

Women’s History Month is a time to honor the courage and resilience of women who've paved the way and to support those who are creating new paths today. But let's be clear:

*
If
women
are
hindered
from
making
autonomous
health
care
choices,
we
fall
short
of
equality.
*
If
the
absence
of
guaranteed
paid
family
leave
forces
women
to
choose
between
family
and
career,
we
fall
short
of
equality.
*
If
pay
disparities
persist,
especially
affecting
women
of
color,
we
fall
short
of
equality.

Friend, it's evident that true equality isn't just about rights on paper; it's about lived experiences and daily realities.

I've stood behind legislation that champions women's health, economic fairness, and equal opportunities. Despite these efforts, challenges remain, particularly with current political dynamics that threaten to undermine women's rights and equality.

We're at a pivotal moment. The actions we take today will shape the world for future generations. As a father, I envision a world for my daughter where her choices, career, and well-being are not compromised. I'm committed to creating that world, not just for her, but for all our daughters and granddaughters.

This Women's History Month, let's reaffirm our commitment to building a balanced and fair world. It's about ensuring that every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions, pursue her ambitions, and receive equal respect and opportunities.

Together, we're not just marking a month; we're shaping the future.

In solidarity,

Eric Swalwell

body:

---
| | Fellow Patriot, [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=888a77ed84fe47c5a41ccf67d282bd8d&_e=2AaMT_zADAZlbfrVssEdyCEEIMJR7qO2jEYnRT-FEO8B-5abbbtBiJz6BVmzGD1veyVpuBEXEVvSVfnQqfuLLnjLSWmJrNaT1c-AlfbRihWXC75CFVgW1xzvvFuT3u2PWMQm3bzcoVaTXph4rcSfb0Iw1yHfLsEwC-y1i1WGRj1PZhLkPQGxGQtCxHSH-V7d5oHMEStfoCaAYZE0mGvr1wN0eyeuucqNjUVkU2sdAv7zug7-U1fY_yeek4EHOMstB2DJqPzikiDYS4nxm9ubRqOozrSxObxvM_yozgcrmMs%3D) If your inbox looks anything like mine, you're seeing a lot of emails about "end-of-month deadlines"

I know you might get tired of seeing them, trust me, I am too. But the truth is, these emails and the goals are important.

I'm not just asking for your financial support because I want to show off a massive cash haul. **We need these contributions to make the real change we want to see in this country.**

My mission is clear: save America from the dangerous path Joe Biden and Tim Kaine have us on and take back our government for the people.

**Thanks to patriots like you, we 're one step closer to that goal. **

clean_body: | | | | | Fellow Patriot, If your inbox looks anything like mine, you're seeing a lot of emails about "end-of-month deadlines" I know you might get tired of seeing them, trust me, I am too. But the truth is, these emails and the goals are important. I'm not just asking for your financial support because I want to show off a massive cash haul. We need these contributions to make the real change we want to see in this country. My mission is clear: save America from the dangerous path Joe Biden and Tim Kaine have us on and take back our government for the people. Thanks to patriots like you, we 're one step closer to that goal. My team tells me that if everyone reading this email chips in $7 in the next 7 minutes, I'll be able to use the momentum to finish this month on top in Virginia. I can't thank you enough, your contribution will help us get over the finish line to win on election day and get to work for the people of Virginia. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina=20=28iPhone=29?=
subject: Getting nervous
body:
Hey Peter. I'll be fast because I'm spending today out campaign trail. E-Day is in just 48 hours!

I've never been more confident that we're going to win this thing on Tuesday and shock the DC power brokers who counted us out.

But I'm also getting nervous. I'm emailing because I need to know if you're still onboard.

If you are - and I hope you are - can you quickly add your name to our endorsement list so I know you're still standing with us? (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=StandWithMe_3324)

We have an army of volunteers knocking on doors and making phone calls all across the district today.

We're 100% focused on targeting the registered Republican voters who have not yet returned a ballot.

This is how we're going to win this Election. We've worked hard for months to get our message out there. Now we're bringing it home!

Please, if you're still standing with me in these final 48 hours, add your name to our official list of supporters. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=StandWithMe_3324)

THANK YOU!

Max Ukropina

Sent from my iPhone

[Click here to watch my remarks.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XToyuanq3pMVUT4wkET-IwYN9hQF-WFo0ikDy9j8k4oRttiP97exOQ6JiB6OFUqK9wwbSXL993i6FexR-nQea54bwLIEjn6Oi81OVGqNBZTgMPMIrD5mcubj8W0bNKddWutZz9fBr7CS2QR-OQqdfg==&c=jBoOh8yimesbRjkaCHKp2MmlLW140RIxnmrM4besCBKC_r6UV--qQg==&ch=sNnUAI_3qSZfYetHF5AALc18cKMjP3wafm55eLVdJaBJZQwW0lLGlQ==)

| Vote Trump on Tuesday!
---
|

| Unlike my opponent, I have been with President Trump since the moment he came down the escalator and in Congress I will work with Trump to pass his America First Agenda. We spent over three hours shaking many hands, we caught up with many friends, and my wife Tracy and I had a wonderful conversation with President Donald J. Trump. So glad my Dad could make it.

Tuesday is Super Tuesday and it is the last day to vote for Trump in the presidential primary. So get ten friends and GO VOTE! [Find specific info about your polling place here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XToyuanq3pMVUT4wkET-IwYN9hQF-WFo0ikDy9j8k4oRttiP97exOYnwfbQ-Iqb9msLJs7Y4U43qqaxlot0lvlbAGMcZDWRejyk6uqRU7sYfVr_JkeTiLxF4Q3-1YvbwzXoesBY9GtfUmaXpBIiNen5iO4pOQ3GY4uVPQLHgU9yfcwYiGh4Rb-X5ju_fWwzVex5lXiNtcIcPEX1uDypDRw==&c=jBoOh8yimesbRjkaCHKp2MmlLW140RIxnmrM4besCBKC_r6UV--qQg==&ch=sNnUAI_3qSZfYetHF5AALc18cKMjP3wafm55eLVdJaBJZQwW0lLGlQ==).

| My Dad, John McGuire Jr.
---
|
---
| My father, age 82, and a US Army Veteran, insisted on going to the Trump rally. He is part of four generations of John McGuires to serve in the US Military, including my son who is stationed in Hawaii. Seeing my Dad overcome challenges in his life gave me the courage to serve our country as a Navy SEAL.
---

|
---

Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda!
I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | | I'm Running for Congress to "Save America" Christian Conservative | Get Out The Vote Trump 2024 | == | We had a wonderful time at the Trump Rally at the Greater Richmond Convention Center! It was a huge honor to address the crowd and lead the Pledge of Allegiance. == | Vote Trump on Tuesday! | | Unlike my opponent, I have been with President Trump since the moment he came down the escalator and in Congress I will work with Trump to pass his America First Agenda. We spent over three hours shaking many hands, we caught up with many friends, and my wife Tracy and I had a wonderful conversation with President Donald J. Trump. So glad my Dad could make it. | | | ---|--- | Tuesday is Super Tuesday and it is the last day to vote for Trump in the presidential primary. So get ten friends and GO VOTE! ==. | Ramona Christian: Volunteer Coordinator Trump Campaign | | | ---|--- | If you would like to volunteer, make phone calls, and help with the Trump campaign efforts in Virginia and nationally please contact Ramona Christian, the Buckingham County GOP Chair, at ramonachristian862@gmail.com or 434-391-4546. | My Dad, John McGuire Jr. | | My father, age 82, and a US Army Veteran, insisted on going to the Trump rally. He is part of four generations of John McGuires to serve in the US Military, including my son who is stationed in Hawaii. Seeing my Dad overcome challenges in his life gave me the courage to serve our country as a Navy SEAL. | Don't Forget to Vote Trump Tuesday | | Don't forget to vote for Trump Tuesday, GO VOTE! ==. | Two Different Rally Experiences | | Everyone was full of smiles yesterday, except my opponent. You can see my opponent and I had two very different experiences at the Virginia GOTV Trump Rally. == == ==. | Spending time with We The People | | | | | | | | | | | | It was great to share the stage at the Virginia GOTV Trump rally with fellow event speakers Delegate A.C. Cordoza and Delegate Wren M. Williams. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Rev. Leon Benjamin | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | | | | | | | For God and Country, Senator John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun (==) Pro-Israel (==) American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.ccsend.com powered by

name: Callie Barr
subject: Thanks and Happy Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80226306/458738177/-1077420326?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240302_na_EOMTY_cand_pb_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDI4NWM5N2EtOGRkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=byp9XbDE_FST4n4mymPZUpK-gEShBihRbRaiRJ6JEFU=)
---
Hey Peter, I wanted to take a quick moment to thank you for your support so far. We’re in the final month of Q1 and it’s Women’s History Month! I know you got a lot of emails asking for money and it means the world to know you’re backing what we’re building here. _**Did you know I could be the first woman major-party nominee in MI-01 history?**_ It’s wild to think this could be considered a milestone in the year 2024, but sadly, not too surprising. Politics has been and can still be considered an old boy’s club. If I had a dollar for every time someone said something about my age or my kids as if any answer to those questions would be disqualifying, I’d have more than enough money to take on Jack Bergman in November. I hear from Michiganders all the time, no matter the political party, that Rep. Bergman is disengaged from the people in Northern and Upper Michigan - he doesn't listen, he’s never in the district, and we can’t trust him to get what we need. **I’m running for Congress, not to be the first but to make sure I’m not the last.** Everybody and I mean everybody should have the opportunity to see themselves represented and to feel heard and valued in their democratic government. Thank you for showing up time and again for our movement to defend our democracy and to ensure a just future of our kids. Let’s make HERstory together, Peter. Tuebor, Callie
---
| Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today?

name: Team WFP
subject: A newsletter for our members
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, It’s time for the WFP monthly newsletter, your opportunity to catch up on what you may have missed in our fight for working class political power! Keep reading for updates on our key elections, how we’re building power in the states, and more.
* * *
**_Tune in for the WFP State of the Union Response with Nicolas O’Rourke_** **This year, we’re so excited to have Nicolas O’Rourke deliver the 2024 Working Families Party State of the Union Response!** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIx8ESSkwOFSpR9CAUaEG3hokiqQ3vyGo8iZljIyQg8_jxE1-A1fQWWMVwm5_Et-iKihNaEvwm58IGatKcf7ksBlJLgpBlowQKbK9mSXYweH7zfp7wPvJD2wZ9kIcmzrsmljsqGgxmlw7k0tKCXbJzY5lQmn-kBjG6EY-dktvQxmHfFzIRSoSDQEJU1Hq3bVzrCj1bn4P3VC3r24iiBZQIm-hcWlyZ75JsG4HaBHB1S83E/44c/jAC1y-sFQHyRohyrVXnSnw/h0/h001.gnmNPoGoiDNV9ZYwCxudcHQGWpFyk3Ha4DKXXLAu1Y4) Shortly following President Biden’s speech next Thursday, March 7th, Councilmember O’Rourke will lay out WFP’s vision for working-class governance from city halls to Congress. He’ll describe how, with a bold agenda of healthcare, housing, public safety, and peace, we can transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long. And he'll also lay out how we can block the MAGA movement from power while building governing power for working families in every city and in every corner of this country — to win the future we all deserve. **[Sign up here or text SOTU to 30403, and we’ll let you know when Nicolas O’Rourke goes live with the 2024 WFP State of the Union Response.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIx8ESSkwOFSpR9CAUaEG3hokiqQ3vyGo8iZljIyQg8_jxE1-A1fQWWMVwm5_Et-iKiK_QpSUzSXonhP8eNHQN910Y5J1O0jOkvYRsCmRkwJejq3U6vhvNk7qeA7VkRjCA1XBCIbEu64JR83pdE9KntLdb6r4W2zs3bYlsuqg3YOLWAe4v9NacKBKPWgGXa9aOW2zlfBfwY6d3Fl4h-536LADuJxYyP97G3YZVTI4seZmE/44c/jAC1y-sFQHyRohyrVXnSnw/h1/h001.7VlbfbyyssDZ_1tu_Z-rjm-ggXPwEYELpI1mDOnIU70)**
* * *
**_Election victories in Wisconsin and New York_** The Wisconsin Working Families Party saw major wins in their primary municipal elections on February 10, with 88% of our candidates moving on to the top-two general election on April 2. We maintained our strength in Milwaukee, while continuing to expand into Racine, Kenosha, Green Bay, and Wausau — allowing us to continue building statewide power and making Wisconsin’s cities work for working families. We’re particularly energized by the news that Wisconsin Governor Tony Evers has signed into law new, fair legislative maps to undo extreme gerrymandering by state Republicans. We’re proud to have helped elect Governor Evers and State Supreme Court Justice Janet Protasiewicz, both of whom were critical to winning maps that truly represent the people of Wisconsin. **[Vox **_NJWFP champion Sue Altman clears the field in congressional primary_** Former New Jersey WFP State Director Sue Altman is running for Congress in one of the most closely-watched House races of the year. And a few weeks ago, seeing the strength of the movement we’re building, **Sue’s final Democratic primary opponent dropped out of the race and endorsed her!** Sue can now focus on defeating incumbent Republican Tom Kean, Jr., who has refused to condemn the January 6 insurrection, voted against codifying abortion rights on the state and federal level, earned a 100% rating from the NRA in 2020, and used his position to support some of the most radical members of the GOP. clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s time for the WFP monthly newsletter, your opportunity to catch up on what you may have missed in our fight for working class political power! Keep reading for updates on our key elections, how we’re building power in the states, and more. Tune in for the WFP State of the Union Response with Nicolas O’Rourke This year, we’re so excited to have Nicolas O’Rourke deliver the 2024 Working Families Party State of the Union Response! Shortly following President Biden’s speech next Thursday, March 7th, Councilmember O’Rourke will lay out WFP’s vision for working-class governance from city halls to Congress. He’ll describe how, with a bold agenda of healthcare, housing, public safety, and peace, we can transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long. And he'll also lay out how we can block the MAGA movement from power while building governing power for working families in every city and in every corner of this country — to win the future we all deserve. Election victories in Wisconsin and New York The Wisconsin Working Families Party saw major wins in their primary municipal elections on February 10, with 88% of our candidates moving on to the top-two general election on April 2. We maintained our strength in Milwaukee, while continuing to expand into Racine, Kenosha, Green Bay, and Wausau — allowing us to continue building statewide power and making Wisconsin’s cities work for working families. We’re particularly energized by the news that Wisconsin Governor Tony Evers has signed into law new, fair legislative maps to undo extreme gerrymandering by state Republicans. We’re proud to have helped elect Governor Evers and State Supreme Court Justice Janet Protasiewicz, both of whom were critical to winning maps that truly represent the people of Wisconsin. ”This redistricting means that Democrats actually have a shot at retaking the majority of the State Assembly in November, a prospect that was virtually impossible under the state’s prior maps, which the GOP had heavily gerrymandered in its favor.” In New York, the congressional district formerly represented by George Santos had its special election last month, and thanks in part to the work by Battleground New York — a coalition including the WFP — we were able to flip this district from red to blue and get us one seat closer to taking back the House of Representatives. “All of these groups are superb at the ground game of retail politics, using the full tool kit of texting, phone banks, door-knocking, and get-out-the-vote help.” The path to taking back the House this year runs through New York, so it’s critically important that we and our partners keep up the work of talking with voters and sharing our vision for a country that works for the many, not the few. NJWFP champion Sue Altman clears the field in congressional primary Former New Jersey WFP State Director Sue Altman is running for Congress in one of the most closely-watched House races of the year. And a few weeks ago, seeing the strength of the movement we’re building, Sue’s final Democratic primary opponent dropped out of the race and endorsed her! Sue can now focus on defeating incumbent Republican Tom Kean, Jr., who has refused to condemn the January 6 insurrection, voted against codifying abortion rights on the state and federal level, earned a 100% rating from the NRA in 2020, and used his position to support some of the most radical members of the GOP. This race is a toss-up, but together, we can win back this critical seat, regain control of the House of Representatives, and send this anti-corruption organizer, former teacher, pro basketball player, and WFP leader to Congress. RIWFP launches its Working Families Agenda The Rhode Island Working Families Party has spent years electing and supporting progressive lawmakers who will put our communities first. And now, they’re banding together and using our collective power to launch the Working Families Agenda: a set of policy proposals that would raise taxes on people making more than $1 million each year to pay for affordable housing, lower prescription drug costs, free meals for students, and more. WFP champion State Rep. Karen Alzate explained: “This is a matter of social justice. Disparities in wealth have reached staging levels. It is our responsibility to ensure that those who have benefited the most from our society pay their fair share.” WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell on our national strategy Hear from WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell on how we’re growing our movement and making change nationwide in Convergence Magazine podcast Hegemonicon’s episode “How the Working Families Party Is Building Progressive Governing Power, with Maurice Mitchell.” Maurice Mitchell: We will be in a position where our people — our agenda, people on the left, progressives, other folks — can actually govern. And so we're building carefully, step by step, seriously, rigorously the institutional power, the candidate pipelines, the movement power, the activist power, the coalitions in order to do that. And when that happens, we believe it's going to unlock a lot of possibility. An update on Gaza, and what you can do to help As the Israeli military prepares to invade Rafah — the city in Gaza where more than one million refugees have fled amidst Israel’s bombing campaign — we need to take action and demand a ceasefire now. Text CEASEFIRE to 30403, and we’ll guide you through calling your member of Congress to share your support for a ceasefire. Upcoming events Send texts to voters with the WFP Text Team on Tuesday, March 12 at 6 PM ET/3 PM PT! We’ll be reaching Ohio voters about four important primary elections happening in their communities this month. On Thursday, March 14 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT, join us virtually for a WFP Welcome Gathering! Our monthly gatherings are an amazing way to hear directly from WFP activists and your fellow members about how we’re building a country for the many, not the few. Thanks for catching up with us, Peter! In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

subject: 🔥3 (IMPORTANT) THINGS!🔥
body:
🔥3 (IMPORTANT) THINGS!🔥 | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=165c8c463a&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
This message has the 3 most important actions you can take this week to help us take back our cities, state, and nation. Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

---
| | | **
WE MUST VOTE
ON****-or- BEFORE
MARCH 19TH!**

---
|
If you're an Ohio Trump supporter, don't skip the March 19th Republican Primary. While President Trump's nomination is secure, there's still crucial work to do. We need your vote to secure Senate control, gain House seats, support local conservatives, and defeat the Ohio "Blue 22". MOST IMPORTANTLY Democrats may try to sway the primary to weaken our candidates by pulling a Republican primary ballot and "crossing over" to steal our votes! Your vote ensures we elect strong Republicans who will advance the "Trump Agenda". Spread the word and vote on March 19th (or any time February 21 or after using absentee or early-voting options). Check out our recommended candidates at **[LiberatorList.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6494b68041&e=5c740fa3e2)**. President Trump is counting on us to shape the future. It's now or never!

---
| |
**THE OHIO “LIBERATOR LIST”

[www.liberatorlist.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a16ee4f324&e=5c740fa3e2)**

---
|
[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b0243fe08d&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**EVENT NOTICE! • CONSIDER ATTENDING****!
PLEASE FORWARD & SHARE!**

---
|
The "Clear Truth Conference" is a 3-day event focused on bringing the Church & God back to the public square. It's March 14-16 in Monclova, just outside Toledo. Click **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=75364650d6&e=5c740fa3e2)** or on the image below for more details. If you can't make it, please share with your friends, family, and church family!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e9d2f121be&e=5c740fa3e2)

Thank you!

---
| |
**CALL FOR LEADERS!**

---
|
The "Unite" page on our website can be accessed [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9086d8ecca&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking the image below. This is a comprehensive list of freedom, small-government, and grassroots activities across the state of Ohio.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fe85a360a3&e=5c740fa3e2)

For many of these activities you can sign-up to join from links on the web page.

_**We need people to step-up to lead some of the workgroups.**_ In some cases to take the load off those who are stretched too thin, who have far too much on their plates. In others we need a leader to form a brand new workgroup team.

**We need leaders for:**
* **Social Media Team**
* **Voter Registration Team**
* **Church & Pastor Database Team**
* **Kids & Schools Team**
* **Candidate Recruiting Team**
* **Comprehensive Candidate "Toolkit" Team**

These are volunteer positions but we do have a small budget for your use.

**If you are interested in discussing the possibility of leading one of these teams, please text or call Mark Pukita at 614-499-0599.**

Thank you!

---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[February 18, 2024 - Vote on or before March 19th!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=083bfaa3de&e=5c740fa3e2)

[January 14, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3f7ef3436d&e=5c740fa3e2)[Ohio Liberator List!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=df8db09b84&e=5c740fa3e2 "URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!")

[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f180cc4d65&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=df537feb27&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bfe601d0d2&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=f120261bd2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=f120261bd2).

name: Dan Morrocco
subject: let's get this straight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland

name: Jon Tester
subject: BREAKING: a new GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
BREAKING NEWS: Another GOP opponent has launched his campaign to defeat Jon Tester and flip Montana’s Senate seat
Rush a split donation with Seth Moulton to help us build the resources we need to fight off the GOP’s attacks, defend Montana’s Senate seat, and hold the Democratic Senate majority >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
[DONATE] [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Folks,
A few days ago, another GOP opponent threw his hat in the ring against me for Montana’s U.S. Senate seat. Experts are saying Montana is a complete toss-up so we have to act ASAP.
This is a critical turning point in our race and we’re about to see a flood of outside money and attacks rush into Montana. You can bet far-right groups will spend unprecedented amounts to attack me and mislead voters.
Mitch McConnell knows Montana is his best shot at taking back the gavel so we need to raise an emergency $1,000,000 this week to fight back ASAP. Outside groups will stop at nothing to defeat me and retake the gavel.
With so much on the line, we cannot afford to lose. Rush a split donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help us raise the funds we need to beat my GOP opponents and protect this seat. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
There has never been a more important time for you to step up than right now.
— Jon

Patriot,

I EJECTED Kevin McCarthy from the speakership, and **now I 'm going RINO hunting.** | [ **HELP MATT ->** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7216f99a68da41d1b0959f55b3207cea&_e=sd-J8X1P_PwvNMCVnTHxmAvt4Ryr8VEjuWHpL5vBYoZ0pXqPqm7FzHnAsOdpeh45TTCKq-krzQaUkZx7UWGrzEo7eRCeyfJzJJ8og-tNiM_9LaT-jdmmRQkhZOKubf3ERc_EIm0c1_B5jxQQaxObvrOWxiAPjDTfG_uxGHG-rkgQDxbWqSM5kDrYCTQybsUlyefmC_icL-YHg_CNGCEG7T_DnO-ZtD70kub6Q7NlicF9jxPvFKjVDWguZ1uV_BSvsQtsvAv1kNFvxTySOoL60bFL8LtohdiaF20ZDnT-KmlDYtJVU5jtBUbKqDhShAcrQ1cLNwzJwRIs8NC--9UCBTLYyjmNAwQHy3U11LCDQlE%3D)
---

I took down RINO Liz Cheney when she blocked our conservative agenda and attacked President Trump.

I took down Kevin McCarthy when he LIED to our faces and cut back room deals with the Radical Left.

**Hey friend.**

Listen, I have one simple question for you.

**Are you really on my team?**

My finance team called and informed me we missed our recent fundraising deadline by - well, to put it bluntly - **a LOT.**

**You can 't blame me for wanting to check on you and confirm your support for conservative values, small government, secure borders, and safe streets.**

In this day and age, who knows what crazy scheme the Dems and Biden could dream up. We need to make sure we're prepared for their attacks this year, and the preparation starts NOW.

Friend, missing deadlines doesn't just make me look bad - it makes our movement look bad. Which is just more ammunition for the Left to outspend us, outraise us, and **BEAT** us in elections.

name: Special Election Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Tossup in Alabama…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
Winning this seat and electing Democrats in tossup races like this deals a major blow to the GOP and helps Democrats build power in state legislative chambers across the country. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**FIRST:** Alabama state Republicans banned abortion with no exception for rape or incest and passed a law threatening prison time for physicians, or anyone who attempts to provide an abortion. **THEN:** A seat opened up in the GOP-controlled House, giving Democrats an incredible _opportunity_ to elect a pro-abortion rights champion. **NOW: Democrat Marilyn Lands is competing in a special election for a seat in the Alabama House on March 26th and this race is a _tossup._** [Rush $7 to elect state Dems →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_97YiXbqIrSSzziB6IrVfR9BQV8OSf2A4EFChmay7mHTvtvIQiS5nQV_Yp_Gv1_js0XdLB-aeeE6ujL5EX8wyRLr_XvCsvt0O4UKFYzLQ39N4qsz_h2fC9HRjAgUX4R1TZ1dTr4l4Mbi3AZSdHrsIgLEFbQxUtRxJrEVG_szWTBHp96-m3x8RJRORWeZOYOh70o6IgnnoIN1TdO71lYIGuSrc6sRpeDgvZ7LZ1QUzHV_pO-MIVHGviLFafYdFg1CpS2dlhyox1JQ8ctOLKY8EOb-Px9ptUdKG2qmBIcAGTOLvCntDOgKppHkKvXEWXrZ0YBGDqrzrgsHWNFCyPHyIWp49_IpyJEi61pm46do6hkE/44c/RHqPyrTgQxyY5raHI5tAyQ/h0/h001.MsmaFySzEFTkhLbh5ZSHu4zw9Zamc6t-swoCKi6ljkI) Winning this seat and electing Democrats in tossup races like this deals a major blow to the GOP and helps Democrats build power in state legislative chambers across the country to defend abortion access, voting, gun safety, and so much more. Expanding Democratic power takes time, especially in solid-red states like Alabama. But if we win this seat, we will have one more Democratic voice in the Alabama House. All eyes are on this race, and we’re counting on you to help get Democrats across the finish line in special elections nationwide. name: Allek Pastrana for Congress
subject: Less than 24 days left for PETITIONS
body:
| | | | [_View in browser_](https://837e3.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/mr/sh/1t6AVsd2XFnIGLoScO4pO5CzFAFC20/pzfgWQh-fNMO)

| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
## Less than 24 days until the petition deadline
To meet requirements to run for office, Allek will either need to pay a **$10,440 fee** or collect **5,711 signatures** on candidate petition forms by **March 25, 2024 (noon)**. We need about **3,000** more petitions to qualify! Any registered voter in Seminole County and part of Volusia County can sign the petition, regardless of party affiliation. Signing the petition doesn’t require you to vote for the Candidate. The Candidate’s party affiliation (Democrat) is marked on the form, as required by law.
---
| [ Download our petition here!](https://837e3.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0mAofabMdU5H7ZLxiu/PrL6gd4Ifk5D)

---
|
---
We have a long road ahead and we need your **SUPPORT!** Stand with Allek, plant your feet firmly on the ground, and shout **NO MORE!** Allek **WILL** fight every day to make sure the economy grows stronger, your rights are protected, and no one is left behind! Contribute to the fight for our future today! If everyone on this list would please support us by donating, we would surpass our February goal! And if you can make it a reoccurring monthly donation, consider it a "**Subscription to Democracy!** " I hope you can help us reach our critical goal before tonight's midnight deadline.

**I'm running for Congressional District 7 and would love your help!**

If everyone on this list would please support us by printing, signing, and mailing your petition over, we would easily qualify for 2024! And the goal is to make Congressman Mills a 1 term Congressman!

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Majority Leader
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It’s up to us to determine whether McConnell’s replacement stays in the minority, or becomes Senate Majority Leader next year.
#

Hey everybody, it’s Ruben.
I’m no fan of Mitch McConnell, and I know I don’t have to tell all of you how much damage he’s responsible for. It didn’t break my heart to know he’ll be stepping down this year.
But I’ve got to be honest with you: Whoever replaces him is going to be so much worse.
The reality we’re staring down is that the Republican establishment is Trump’s party — and it’s going to be a race to the bottom over the next several months as they try to pick a new leader. Every single one of them will be out-Trumping each other.
But there’s a silver lining here: McConnell is stepping down as Minority Leader. **It’s up to us to determine whether McConnell’s replacement stays in the minority, or becomes Senate Majority Leader next year.**
I know we just finished a deadline drive last Thursday. But I’m going to need all of you with me if we’re going to win in Arizona and hold control of the Senate. Especially because this is an official FEC deadline month — the first of the election year.
[**So please, if you can, chip in to my campaign for U.S. Senate today and help us start March off strong. It’s up to us now, and I can’t do this without you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240303-1-30&t=1&akid=2011%2E734936%2E5OxIAC)

name: Emma Gore, Campaign Manager
subject: Here’s why this primary matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
I’m writing to report to you on where Andrei’s campaign stands with 150 days to go until this critical election |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80231183/458753722/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240303_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxZmUyZjEtOWNkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LlMk0udxL_o7UhY0xmRPvoWeUKWnb02J2fnvCEMn8Qo=)
---
Peter, With 150 days to go until our primary election is over, I wanted to report to you on why these next weeks are _**the most critical time**_ of the campaign. I bet that if you read on, you’ll be convinced about why this is the moment that Andrei needs your help and why he’s the candidate to support to flip AZ-01 blue. **[But if you’re already convinced, will you chip in to this grassroots campaign to help us gain momentum during this critical time?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80231184/458753723/-1011897668?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240303_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxZmUyZjEtOWNkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LlMk0udxL_o7UhY0xmRPvoWeUKWnb02J2fnvCEMn8Qo=)** We sometimes hear from folks that they want to wait to get involved in helping Andrei’s campaign – wait until after the primary, wait until the fall, wait until closer to the election. I get it. But here are three reasons why **_now is the time_** when your contribution will have the biggest impact. **#1: We need to nominate a candidate who can beat David Schweikert.**
Democrats have come up heartbreakingly short before. To win, we need a nominee with the profile to build a coalition that can win this toss-up district. Andrei’s lifetime of experience as an Arizona Assistant Attorney General prosecuting border smuggling rings, serving in uniform after 9/11, and leading a business that created thousands of jobs is exactly the background that the swing voters who will decide this race are excited about. And because of the historic grassroots excitement for Andrei’s campaign, we have the ability to get that message out to voters. Most of Andrei’s campaign contributions have been $50 or less. But that support adds up. **_Today, Andrei is the only challenger in America to have outraised the incumbent he’s running against in every quarter of the campaign._** We need to keep on building on that support as election day approaches. **[Peter, will you make a grassroots contribution of any size today to help Andrei defeat extremist David Schweikert?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80231185/458753724/-1011897668?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240303_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxZmUyZjEtOWNkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LlMk0udxL_o7UhY0xmRPvoWeUKWnb02J2fnvCEMn8Qo=)** **#2: Primaries matter.**
Andrei always says that this election isn’t just about defeating David Schweikert. It’s about replacing him with someone who has a track record voters can trust to deliver for them. Andrei knows this firsthand. He narrowly lost the primary for Congress to Kyrsten Sinema back in 2012 after trying to warn people that she was every Republican powerbroker’s favorite Democrat. AZ-01 can’t send a Republican in Democrats' clothing to Washington. **_Andrei is alone in this primary field, having a lifetime of fighting for our values, priorities, and principles._** **#3: The next 150 days are critical to ensuring we defeat David Schweikert.**
Finally, the next 150 days are not just about winning this primary. They’re also our window of opportunity to win the general election and make this one of the just four seats Democrats need to retake control of Congress. Arizona is one of four swing states for the election between Joe Biden and Donald Trump. It has one of three toss-up U.S. Senate races in America. Come September and October, the airwaves will be saturated. We need to get our message out to voters about the choice between Andrei and David Schweikert _**now**_ – and not wait until the fall. **[These next 150 days are crunch time for our campaign. Please give $25, $50, or whatever you can to help ensure Andrei wins so AZ-01 can finally have a proven public servant working for them in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80231186/458753725/-1011897668?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240303_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxZmUyZjEtOWNkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LlMk0udxL_o7UhY0xmRPvoWeUKWnb02J2fnvCEMn8Qo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80231187/458753726/-1011897668?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240303_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxZmUyZjEtOWNkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LlMk0udxL_o7UhY0xmRPvoWeUKWnb02J2fnvCEMn8Qo=)

Emma Gore

name: Andy Kim
subject: The energy on the ground is electric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
I’m running a different kind of campaign because that’s what the people of New Jersey want right now.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80231347/458754141/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTg2YWUxMC05ZWQ5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qoJTZkLiHtv1iZMo7KTcfsUxLkCsKjUDSFsb9yh7cIs=&emci=63bf6fb1-4ad7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=da86ae10-9ed9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and earning their support. The energy across New Jersey is infectious. The crowds have been amazing. Our events have been absolutely packed. Conventions have been electrifying. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80231348/458754142/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-03-energy&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=da86ae10-9ed9-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTg2YWUxMC05ZWQ5LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qoJTZkLiHtv1iZMo7KTcfsUxLkCsKjUDSFsb9yh7cIs=) **There is a hunger in New Jersey and across the country for new leadership.****That's why the most recent public poll has us with a strong lead against our well-connected opponent.** People are tired of corrupt politics as usual that only benefit the well-off and well-connected. In fact, 84% of people surveyed in New Jersey believe that the elite political leaders in our state are corrupt. We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. clean_body: I’m running a different kind of campaign because that’s what the people of New Jersey want right now. | | | | I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and earning their support. The energy across New Jersey is infectious. The crowds have been amazing. Our events have been absolutely packed. Conventions have been electrifying. = There is a hunger in New Jersey and across the country for new leadership.That's why the most recent public poll has us with a strong lead against our well-connected opponent. People are tired of corrupt politics as usual that only benefit the well-off and well-connected. In fact, 84% of people surveyed in New Jersey believe that the elite political leaders in our state are corrupt. We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. I decided to step up and fight this corruption because I'm ready to bring change, and I can see that the people of New Jersey are with me in this fight. But these coins are more than just a token of my appreciation... they go back to when I was serving on the front lines in Iraq.

You see, the design wasn’t my idea - it was created by the men under my command. When we were serving, they would spray paint the “hung cow” all over the “T” walls.

It was a way to boost morale, and it was a way that my team showed me that they’d always have my back.

**Now, I have a new team of patriots, and YOU'RE a key part of it!**

As the only candidate in this race who doesn't take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil, Big Pharma and Big Bank CEOs, Katie is really counting on you to help us pull this off. —Team KP Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

body:

☀️ Peter -- ☀️ To all Joe Biden and Kamala Harris supporters, please don't click away from this important message.

Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the last election. Now think for a second about how winning this next election is far from guaranteed.

As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking Joe Biden relentlessly with negative campaign ads in key states across the country. We need your help to fight back.

If everyone reading this donated even just $5 to President Biden's reelection campaign, we'd have the resources we needed to win this election. But not everyone gives, that's why people who understand that this race can be won or lost in the early stages chip in today.

Most of the donations we receive come from people giving smaller amounts of money. We're passionate about this model of fundraising because at its core it means this campaign is powered by people like you. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. If you can give $5, we're asking you to give $5. If you can give $25 or more, we're asking you to give that.

body:
So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise – he faced the same thing when he endorsed Trump too.

| |

| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=4138d44116a54034b1fc97111b4eb9fc&_t=lhIeiEmF5-B635FfzQ_5Ljj8xKZY5W_uukqSL-9cSvil4L7zKT6RS-rayYNb_mUaoQRFhixi4KY7SxdxV_pVDcxeAI7KOV37i1TQ6EzidBE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=4138d44116a54034b1fc97111b4eb9fc&_t=lhIeiEmF5-B635FfzQ_5Ljj8xKZY5W_uukqSL-9cSvil4L7zKT6RS-rayYNb_mUaoQRFhixi4KY7SxdxV_pVDcxeAI7KOV37i1TQ6EzidBE%3D)

| My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson.

_You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. _

So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing when he endorsed Trump too.

_**[He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we've got to stick together.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4138d44116a54034b1fc97111b4eb9fc&_e=OgJl3VutkyH9hL0UOMmnoxzqx6_OFVqtaiM8cZ_2juHCXqTgDJQgPdnQF9HSDHAXEmV-Sjm4ufIUogpOEBRbVs-pMFrzQ_CN8TEnVKDCtwZ_3q4k2VmRV3YxJpGBnEYMa3ll60GnM6s6GnkUy9PIgScmQzkU2zEijPJCl4sRl8aBhIKGiWS49MQHa1UhBtmbcMyemtt46B1LojGxlVBgM_Gnq65UGTVK-MGRQ-meLnNSAmHYKRuNjyFvWc6_-37EKLsWmmLHedl3jNiy0Qn-qv24xSOKvJsg4TAGC_iKZN8WCMXSHohaQ9ahkapYF5tG8QDH4PqBmSNKrpSWFxNM8ZjwmwfK529huIrR3hEEKSj__iy5pYL4OfpE2R6H4-cwkKJwWiy7JGOOpYjKIkqk977N8dngAAwGvInvdQbH_ZY%3D "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together.")**_

That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.

But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse:
** Problem #1: ** We have TWO imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals.

** Problem #2: ** House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us.

** Problem #3: ** Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump.
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute...

_**[So as one of my first moves of the election year, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4138d44116a54034b1fc97111b4eb9fc&_e=OgJl3VutkyH9hL0UOMmnoxzqx6_OFVqtaiM8cZ_2juHCXqTgDJQgPdnQF9HSDHAXEmV-Sjm4ufIUogpOEBRbVs-pMFrzQ_CN8TEnVKDCtwZ_3q4k2VmRV3YxJpGBnEYMa3ll60GnM6s6GnkUy9PIgScmQzkU2zEijPJCl4sRl8aBhIKGiWS49MQHa1UhBtmbcMyemtt46B1LojGxlVBgM_Gnq65UGTVK-MGRQ-meLnNSAmHYKRuNjyFvWc6_-37EKLsWmmLHedl3jNiy0Qn-qnJ4-UKEH_Xsa-X9Gi7jEflSawdXOWxN4BoTw5biZgZ-o0eTwVh3W-ZeVphMLUA5AxVFCDOJj2XEfqc-xMXUCCQ2fujOWOinRMGxtKMPFIBO4uvysD10zHp5c8V3-58Wj4575WtnSK8QaB3zLpj1gIs%3D "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state.

If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: **1) ** SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, **2) ** SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and **3) ** Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN.

Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. **That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. **

_I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. _

_**[I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4138d44116a54034b1fc97111b4eb9fc&_e=OgJl3VutkyH9hL0UOMmnoxzqx6_OFVqtaiM8cZ_2juHCXqTgDJQgPdnQF9HSDHAXEmV-Sjm4ufIUogpOEBRbVs-pMFrzQ_CN8TEnVKDCtwZ_3q4k2VmRV3YxJpGBnEYMa3ll60GnM6s6GnkUy9PIgScmQzkU2zEijPJCl4sRl8aBhIKGiWS49MQHa1UhBtmbcMyemtt46B1LojGxlVBgM_Gnq65UGTVK-MGRQ-meLnNSAmHYKRuNjyFvWc6_-37EKLsWmmLHedl3jNiy0Qn-quKTRKpnc4euC1ssLj3dmeLm0nCq9UD-z1U0Kx2MfHWx1iv_wZxAk40bJ6aUZH2Wzvq5V2jZKZY7aoXHy4q0r5WjjIwva_gJOXByUb_qSwrFRXWdFpPobOMMQJNI187tvpulFPsWgU0N78IYJRlCs9Q%3D "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.")**_

When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING?

Mike Johnson (Speaker of the House)

clean_body: So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise – he faced the same thing when he endorsed Trump too. | | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson. You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing when he endorsed Trump too. "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together." That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat. But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse: Problem #1: We have TWO imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals. Problem #2: House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us. Problem #3: Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump. I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute... "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state. If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: 1) SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, 2) SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and 3) Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN. Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford." When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING?
