name: Adam Schiff
subject: Sleazebag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63346?t=6&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf) We are just 2 days away from the primary election, team — and MAGA Republicans are scaling up their attacks and insults like we’ve never seen before. Especially Donald Trump.

[Before I get into all the MAGA attacks I’ve dealt with, will you pitch in $10 or any amount between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign so we can respond and reach the crucial undecided voters we need to connect with before March 5th?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63346?t=7&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf) | [**DONATE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63346?t=8&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf)
---
Recently, there was a panel discussion called “Adam Schiff Justice” at the Conservative Political Action Conference (known as CPAC). And trust me, it was not designed to be a flattering reference.

Then, MAGA House Republican leader Elise Stefanik spent her speaking time at CPAC attacking me.

She called me a **“Russia hoaxer”** and denied the January 6th insurrection.

And only a few hours later, Donald Trump took the stage at a campaign rally in South Carolina, where he once again lashed out at me.

He called me a **“sleazebag”** for investigating his blackmail threat to bribe Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to dig up dirt on Joe Biden. And more.

**All of this happened _in one day._**

With only 2 days until our primary election, we can only expect more attacks from here. And while we’re spending our campaign resources on reaching voters, we also need to be able to respond to these outrageous attacks against me.

[Will you rush an urgent split contribution of $10 or any amount between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help us fight back against Trump and his MAGA cronies?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63346?t=9&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63347?t=10&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63348?t=11&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63349?t=12&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63350?t=13&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63351?t=14&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf)
Thanks for rushing in your support.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13237%2E878179%2E09hlpf).**

name: Jon Tester
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
| |
---
Peter, it’s been exactly one year since we launched our campaign for reelection. So I wanted to share a story with you: I grew up on my family’s farm and I still work the land today. That explains a lot about me. When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there—but I damn sure remember pulling it out. Here’s why I’m telling you this: Just like my $12 flattop haircut and my dirt-stained t-shirts, my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused on defending Montana. With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will roll up their sleeves and get to work. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m a proud dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country. But I’m in the toughest campaign of my life, and I need your help more than ever. [So here’s the part where I ask: Can you split a critical $50 donation between my reelection campaign and United Rural Democrats? Your donations directly power everything we do, and it would mean a lot to me personally if you chipped in name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: 5 reasons why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2192%2E552475%2EZWume6)
Peter, just $5 today will help protect the Senate majority in November.
**[CHIP IN $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240303-2?refcode=em20240303-2&recurring=1&amount=5&refcode2=2192_552475_ZWume6&akid=2192%2E552475%2EZWume6)**
Here’s why:
1. **We’re up against a self-funding mega-millionaire who outraised us last quarter AND donated $1 million of his own money to his campaign,** putting him at an advantage.

2. **A billionaire-backed super PAC just placed a $1 million ad buy in Pennsylvania attacking Bob,** and we can’t let these attacks go unanswered.

3. Not only does McCormick have the resources to self-fund his race, but **he also has the backing of Wall Street billionaires who are trying to buy this seat** -- a super PAC supporting him raised a record-breaking $18 million in 2023.

4. **Pennsylvania is a key battleground in 2024,** and it’s critical to holding both the White House and the Senate. We can’t afford to come up short.

5. If David McCormick outraises us again, **it could be the difference between winning and losing.**

[**So please, will you chip in $5 right now to keep PA, the Senate, and the White House blue? Every $5 donation gets us closer to winning this November, so thank you in advance.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240303-2?refcode=em20240303-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2192_552475_ZWume6&akid=2192%2E552475%2EZWume6)

clean_body: Peter, just $5 today will help protect the Senate majority in November. Here’s why: 1. We’re up against a self-funding mega-millionaire who outraised us last quarter AND donated $1 million of his own money to his campaign, putting him at an advantage. 2. A billionaire-backed super PAC just placed a $1 million ad buy in Pennsylvania attacking Bob, and we can’t let these attacks go unanswered. 3. Not only does McCormick have the resources to self-fund his race, but he also has the backing of Wall Street billionaires who are trying to buy this seat -- a super PAC supporting him raised a record-breaking $18 million in 2023. 4. Pennsylvania is a key battleground in 2024, and it’s critical to holding both the White House and the Senate. We can’t afford to come up short. 5. If David McCormick outraises us again, it could be the difference between winning and losing. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. — Team Casey

From: Stacey Abrams

Subject: Why Georgia matters
To: you <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Georgia lives inside my heart.

I grew up in Georgia, went to college at Spelman, and worked for the City of Atlanta under Mayors Maynard Jackson and Shirley Franklin. **_Georgia is home for me, and Georgians will always be near and dear to my heart._**

And what happens in my home state is relevant not just to Georgians, but to the entire nation. Georgians propelled Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House in 2020 and sent Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to the Senate in 2021.

**This year, again, Georgia will be the center of the fight for democracy. And I want to make sure the Georgia Democrats have the support they need to win up and down the ballot, all across the state, to elect leaders who will put the people of Georgia first in everything they do.**

clean_body: Did you see? | | | Peter, Did you get Stacey’s email on Thursday ahead of our February deadline? Stacey Abrams is all in on Georgia because she understands just how much impact what happens in Georgia has on the rest of the country. = – GA Dems \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Stacey Abrams Date: Thu, Feb 29, 2024 at 3:29 PM Subject: Why Georgia matters To: you <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Georgia lives inside my heart. I grew up in Georgia, went to college at Spelman, and worked for the City of Atlanta under Mayors Maynard Jackson and Shirley Franklin. Georgia is home for me, and Georgians will always be near and dear to my heart. And what happens in my home state is relevant not just to Georgians, but to the entire nation. Georgians propelled Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House in 2020 and sent Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to the Senate in 2021. This year, again, Georgia will be the center of the fight for democracy. And I want to make sure the Georgia Democrats have the support they need to win up and down the ballot, all across the state, to elect leaders who will put the people of Georgia first in everything they do. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = With so much on the line this year, we need everyone pitching in and doing what they can. = Thank you for all your support, Stacey | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: Josh Harder
subject: It’s not looking good…
body:
We have two major problems.

Hey Peter,
We have two major problems happening simultaneously.
First, my GOP opponent Kevin Lincoln is running thousands of dollars in ads to get Trump supporters out to vote for him on Tuesday.
Second, there are still thousands of Democrats in our district who have not returned their ballots. It’s not looking good...
[**Will you please rush in a donation right now so we can put more resources towards getting out the vote in the final days of this race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80233699/458761800/2012216730?&refcode=E7335-20240303-NotLookingGood-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIwNWJiMGEtYjBkOS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GdSOfYhie7UL-OCV1tMR-OL70zOEAeDYWICd9MD8FKA=)
I wish I had better news to share!
\- Josh

Josh Harder for Congress
PO Box 4220
Manteca, CA 95337
United States

Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and connect with our future President. [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=2)
|
* * *

[Las Vegas, Nevada](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=3) \- Friday, March 8th at 6:00 PM
Please join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-private-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=4) \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM
Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/american-wellness-summit?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=5) \- Saturday, March 16th at 9:00 AM
Experience a day of wellness, inspiration, live musical performances, biohacking, and exclusive time with Mr. Kennedy while supporting his candidacy for President of the United States.
[San Diego, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/san-diego-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=6) \- Tuesday, March 26th at 6:00 PM
The event will include a private sunset reception followed by cocktails and heavy hors d’oeuvres, a fireside chat, Q&A, a photo opportunity for all. Please support Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at this exclusive in-person event.
[Dallas, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/dallas-texas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=7) \- Sunday, April 14th at 4:00 PM
Elevate your support for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s presidential campaign at an intimate fundraising reception. Enjoy delectable hors d’oeuvres and cocktails while partaking in a fireside chat and an inspiring Q&A session.
[Palos Verdes, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/palos-verdes?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=8) \- Thursday, April 18th at 6:00 PM
This private reception is an opportunity to see and hear RFK, Jr. up close and personal. It includes remarks by the candidate, an intimate Q&A, and photo opportunity for all.
|
* * *
---
RFK Jr.: The Double Standard Of Secret Service Protection
Ex-Secret Service agent and political commentator Dan Bongino is as baffled as I am why a congressional advisory committee just voted in favor of granting Nikki Haley Secret Service protection when I have been denied the same protection.
Refusing me protection is a way to drain my campaign funds, stop the movement we’re building together, and get us out of the race by any means necessary. This is blatant election interference.
While I agree Nikki Haley deserves protection and have immense respect for the Secret Service, double standards abound.
My campaign first requested Secret Service protection in May 2023; our request remains pending. It’s the first time in 55 years a presidential candidate has been denied.
Unfortunately for the establishment, I’m not going anywhere. A coalition is building. Most Americans agree huge shifts are needed, but the political elite are doing everything they can to keep that from happening. **Give me a sword and some ground to stand on, and we will take our country back.**
[If you have not already done so, please add your name to our Petition to Provide Secret Service Protection to Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and his family today.](https://security.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=9)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/double-standard-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_3_24_e1&n=10)

Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity. \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers. \- Saturday, March 16th at 9:00 AM Experience a day of wellness, inspiration, live musical performances, biohacking, and exclusive time with Mr. Kennedy while supporting his candidacy for President of the United States. \- Tuesday, March 26th at 6:00 PM The event will include a private sunset reception followed by cocktails and heavy hors d’oeuvres, a fireside chat, Q&A, a photo opportunity for all. Please support Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at this exclusive in-person event. \- Sunday, April 14th at 4:00 PM Elevate your support for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s presidential campaign at an intimate fundraising reception. Enjoy delectable hors d’oeuvres and cocktails while partaking in a fireside chat and an inspiring Q&A session. \- Thursday, April 18th at 6:00 PM This private reception is an opportunity to see and hear RFK, Jr. up close and personal. It includes remarks by the candidate, an intimate Q&A, and photo opportunity for all. | RFK Jr.: The Double Standard Of Secret Service Protection Ex-Secret Service agent and political commentator Dan Bongino is as baffled as I am why a congressional advisory committee just voted in favor of granting Nikki Haley Secret Service protection when I have been denied the same protection. Refusing me protection is a way to drain my campaign funds, stop the movement we’re building together, and get us out of the race by any means necessary. This is blatant election interference. While I agree Nikki Haley deserves protection and have immense respect for the Secret Service, double standards abound. My campaign first requested Secret Service protection in May 2023; our request remains pending. It’s the first time in 55 years a presidential candidate has been denied. Unfortunately for the establishment, I’m not going anywhere. A coalition is building. Most Americans agree huge shifts are needed, but the political elite are doing everything they can to keep that from happening. Give me a sword and some ground to stand on, and we will take our country back. | | Wrap yourself in the spirit of hope and unity with our ! From cozy hoodies to stylish crop tops, express your support for positive change in comfort and style. Choose from a variety of options, including our iconic Clover Unisex Hoodie and embroidered designs, to make a bold statement for a brighter future alongside Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. Thank you for your continued support. Every dollar you give moves us one step closer to the White House. | * | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

State Democrats are facing _a slew_ of special elections over the next two months – some of which are vital for Democratic control.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **

name: Tammy
subject: Eric Hovde is up on the airwaves
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2133%2E35263%2Eh0z4i6)
Hi Peter, Tammy here. I wish I had better news, but my team notified me that my Republican opponent, Eric Hovde, is already up on the airwaves with his first round of TV ads. Hovde has pledged to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to flip my seat, and he’s wasting no time — he’s pouring at least **$1 million** into this first round of TV ads. So unless we fight back now, Hovde will have the airwaves to himself to blast out his message across the state. I need your help to make sure our campaign has the resources to make sure Wisconsinites know his extreme views on abortion, Social Security, and the ACA. **Will you make a donation to help me fight back? Here’s my personal link you can use to donate:[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-mar24?refcode=tammy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240303_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2133%2E35263%2Eh0z4i6)** Thanks,
Tammy
---
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=2133%2E35263%2Eh0z4i6) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=2133%2E35263%2Eh0z4i6)**

Peter, it’s go time: **Today, I’m officially launching my reelection campaign to keep representing FL-10 in Congress!** [**_With your support, I’ll make history as the first member of Gen Z to ever be _reelected_ to Congress. In 2022, Central Florida put its trust in me – a Gen Z, working class, Afro-Latino organizer – and I became the first of my generation to ever be elected to Congress.

This win didn’t come easy, Peter. _A lot_ of people counted me out. They said that I was too young. That I didn’t have the “right” experience. That my generation didn’t deserve a seat at the decision-making table. They didn’t think I stood a _chance._

But people like you ignored all of that noise, and I was able to defy the odds. _We did that._

**Now, our youth-powered movement has become a powerful force for change – and a direct threat to the status quo. That’s why fascist leaders in Florida, the gun lobby, and countless special interests are all plotting to replace me in this election.**

I’m ready to fight back, but I’m going to need YOU to join my team to win on Election Day, Peter.

Hey - Matt Dolan here.

The sole purpose of my campaign is to return strong conservative leadership to Washington, D.C. **_I am the ONLY candidate in this race with a proven track record of delivering results for you, your family, and your community._**

name: Mike Johnson [Speaker of the House]
subject: Fire and brimstone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson.

_You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. _

So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing when he endorsed Trump too.

_**[He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we've got to stick together.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6f721d9d5ab645b6a57d1f59703001c8&_e=dIjoa4etzSp7aslyX32Pkn-tOeelPPWGe1nHHKB45r4FuTw9JpyVaxnybWI6KuMs_LWkRevIRwCMi0yBscYIpA-qNmDUt3tz1pzKnZ3IWqfYVbzWTvY5B2d2pkak_Blqzzve9dItyZam4fPZJMjtzA3UJozB7DWSCHiPONzP7eMcEUW9xBIwf0bmF9o98J4VpXBRP4-OYc7LyqPEtc1rL7A14M_kBb0aWeIGfRvZ2cQBM6DD8i5Pc7UveodFJGc292jDljQYOj23LqrZVRIZZS2HfKKfjKvQquBiKH2U7q7RC3MzzTkGcx_KbPX-H795Ow66czbw3Yp4qsUjK2aMxU0xDgotHhPgLnuizLhUX8tl5b7y1iAfbRMAxSFcOd35fqeP6dCtOKWZHlanxZ83ZjF_eXb1B6thNrQmzXaDmQo%3D "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together.")**_

That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.

But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse:
** Problem #1: ** We have TWO imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals.

** Problem #2: ** House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us.

** Problem #3: ** Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump.
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute...

_**[So as one of my first moves of the election year, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6f721d9d5ab645b6a57d1f59703001c8&_e=dIjoa4etzSp7aslyX32Pkn-tOeelPPWGe1nHHKB45r4FuTw9JpyVaxnybWI6KuMs_LWkRevIRwCMi0yBscYIpA-qNmDUt3tz1pzKnZ3IWqfYVbzWTvY5B2d2pkak_Blqzzve9dItyZam4fPZJMjtzA3UJozB7DWSCHiPONzP7eMcEUW9xBIwf0bmF9o98J4VpXBRP4-OYc7LyqPEtc1rL7A14M_kBb0aWeIGfRvZ2cQBM6DD8i5Pc7UveodFJGc292jDljQYOj23LqrZVRIZZXgrGxxFgaXSYdZugNoT5TlAhL9Cg4E9o6Q7xEtqGt05aXWjf7K6v3aonIdZcTJycgaqXJiZFaWwC94ubMDv1kMopzWgPm5W2P6M8b33MU16yhJgjhntGUlY3mpdULcBJYpqu4v78HXOeQMOFv9aOhE%3D "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state.

If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: **1) ** SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, **2) ** SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and **3) ** Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN.

Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. **That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. **

_I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. _

_**[I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6f721d9d5ab645b6a57d1f59703001c8&_e=dIjoa4etzSp7aslyX32Pkn-tOeelPPWGe1nHHKB45r4FuTw9JpyVaxnybWI6KuMs_LWkRevIRwCMi0yBscYIpA-qNmDUt3tz1pzKnZ3IWqfYVbzWTvY5B2d2pkak_Blqzzve9dItyZam4fPZJMjtzA3UJozB7DWSCHiPONzP7eMcEUW9xBIwf0bmF9o98J4VpXBRP4-OYc7LyqPEtc1rL7A14M_kBb0aWeIGfRvZ2cQBM6DD8i5Pc7UveodFJGc292jDljQYOj23LqrZVRIZZbVu6S_vRVgtnXp1K_nlopFND4Zdtpw6nZ8hjdABtWPB0v6Mhs583n66vz8pa6mYM4jS5WenPFKRxsTMH6ZamLKZr5000LX3PoWXYBSsEy32ZV-l_0JEGo0DMStRMxN0MTyaLP_Z_DRXQwvYEqdnMJk%3D "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.")**_

When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING?
---
**[](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6f721d9d5ab645b6a57d1f59703001c8&_e=dIjoa4etzSp7aslyX32Pkn-tOeelPPWGe1nHHKB45r4FuTw9JpyVaxnybWI6KuMs_LWkRevIRwCMi0yBscYIpA-qNmDUt3tz1pzKnZ3IWqfYVbzWTvY5B2d2pkak_Blqzzve9dItyZam4fPZJMjtzA3UJozB7DWSCHiPONzP7eMcEUW9xBIwf0bmF9o98J4VpXBRP4-OYc7LyqPEtc1rL7A14M_kBb0aWeIGfRvZ2cQBM6DD8i5Pc7UveodFJGc292jDljQYOj23LqrZVRIZZb_2Wr4KC7hqvrpaOpxWslRTUHYauNvbgwUxYhOQSwuOL5YQ0E5aVunxC223uu4lbfvJLrgyL34xirzan5wmU9CDJghsrtDNQjQtcsn-IHU5h9VBM8pc9rG8AfCU96OiHlGLoEHNot-3SNHRN8wE3mY%3D)[**YES >>**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6f721d9d5ab645b6a57d1f59703001c8&_e=dIjoa4etzSp7aslyX32Pkn-tOeelPPWGe1nHHKB45r4FuTw9JpyVaxnybWI6KuMs_LWkRevIRwCMi0yBscYIpA-qNmDUt3tz1pzKnZ3IWqfYVbzWTvY5B2d2pkak_Blqzzve9dItyZam4fPZJMjtzA3UJozB7DWSCHiPONzP7eMcEUW9xBIwf0bmF9o98J4VpXBRP4-OYc7LyqPEtc1rL7A14M_kBb0aWeIGfRvZ2cQBM6DD8i5Pc7UveodFJGc292jDljQYOj23LqrZVRIZZUL6VvZN4XjQb6kTFt71qhs4YQmirW_MIfCwy9bzv7ylojauZpCdRw6aFxcvElwo2Rm9EokKnHRCRp6UspHL79PohhdyFPL2kWvF2_ovB1-EA0qBpXVmSrUinA_pSw-OYybRJ6loLDOzpx1kX6tvy9Y%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6f721d9d5ab645b6a57d1f59703001c8&_e=dIjoa4etzSp7aslyX32Pkn-tOeelPPWGe1nHHKB45r4FuTw9JpyVaxnybWI6KuMs_LWkRevIRwCMi0yBscYIpA-qNmDUt3tz1pzKnZ3IWqfYVbzWTvY5B2d2pkak_Blqzzve9dItyZam4fPZJMjtzA3UJozB7DWSCHiPONzP7eMcEUW9xBIwf0bmF9o98J4VpXBRP4-OYc7LyqPEtc1rL7A14M_kBb0aWeIGfRvZ2cQBM6DD8i5Pc7UveodFJGc292jDljQYOj23LqrZVRIZZZyzBIGwspgwpdPaGmE_gq1FbrLy5Etwsob1tEK8Sdl8Kc_RmVMUCr1yzi6RJm_vSzG1_lvvRlqjlXDDoZAE-FK2Zmf7gJx4xX2yjCl4paEYioh9GneFoCAmDOl7clmxGtMpMNTE7KGIgV448BB5K6A%3D)**
---
Thanks for everything you do.

In liberty,
Mike Johnson (Speaker of the House)

clean_body: | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson. You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing when he endorsed Trump too. "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together." That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat. But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse: Problem #1: We have TWO imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals. Problem #2: House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us. Problem #3: Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump. I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute... "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state. If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: 1) SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, 2) SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and 3) Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN. Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford." When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING? Thanks for everything you do. In liberty, Mike Johnson (Speaker of the House) | "Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to %%Emailc%% because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

name: Roger Williams (Personal)
subject: Anti-semitism is on the rise
body:
The Squad stays silent

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/roger-williams-for-us-congress/trump-achieved-peace-av)
---
| | Peter, _**President Trump has been nominated AGAIN for a Nobel Peace Prize underscoring his significant achievements in foreign policy. **_ In 2018, Trump was praised for his agreement with Kim Jong Un to work toward the denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula. In 2020 and 2021, he was nominated for his work on the Abraham Accords bringing “Peace to the Middle East” for the first time in nearly 30 years- which many critics claimed would never happen. Now, he’s being nominated again for his work on the Abraham Accords and the stability he brought to American foreign policy. _**Trump NEVER started a new war and exemplified leadership through strength. **_
---
| | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/roger-williams-for-us-congress/trump-achieved-peace-av)
---
| | **Do you believe Trump should receive a Nobel Peace Prize? **
---
| | | [ YES ](https://secure.winred.com/roger-williams-for-us-congress/trump-achieved-peace-av)
---
| | | [ NO ](https://secure.winred.com/roger-williams-for-us-congress/trump-achieved-peace-av)
---
| | President Trump has done more to bring peace to the world than other recipients. Even Obama was confused after he won in 2009- because he did nothing to deserve the honor. [_**_Peter, take our poll and let us know if Trump deserves this nomination >>>_**_](https://secure.winred.com/roger-williams-for-us-congress/trump-achieved-peace-av) Thank you, Team Williams
---
|

| | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.
